---
title: "dna_methylation_ra_vs_oa_further_without_xy_open_regions"
output: html_document
date: "2025-07-22"
---

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results = 'hide'}

#loading those libraries
library(pheatmap)
library(tidyverse)
library(DMRcate)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(readr)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggthemr)
library(envalysis)
library(readxl)
library(rstatix)
library(VennDiagram)
library(missMethyl)
library(methylGSA)
library(IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19)
library(pheatmap)
library(gridExtra)
library(TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(annotatr)
library(UpSetR)
library(patchwork)
library(ComplexUpset)
library(purrr)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(ReactomePA)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(ggtext)
library(scales)
library(viridisLite)
library(ggalluvial)
library(patchwork)
library(dplyr)

select <- dplyr::select
count <- dplyr::count

```

#Visualization and Further Analysis on RA vs Healthy across all joints using open regions
##DMPs related analysis 
###reading beta values and DMPs

```{r}

setwd("~/Desktop/PhD/2025 First Term/DNA Methylation")

#read the RDS object containing merged beta values and annotation file (after X and Y chromosome probe removed) filtered according to the open region 
filtered_data <- readRDS("outputs - after xy removal - open regions/open_region_filtered_data_all.rds")
beta_values_filtered <- filtered_data$beta_values_filtered
annotation_file_filtered <- filtered_data$annotation_file_filtered
patients <- filtered_data$patients

#read the RDS object on the results of RA vs Healthy and OA vs Healthy 
ra_and_oa_vs_healthy_list <- readRDS("outputs - after xy removal - open regions/RA_and_OA_vs_Healthy_filteredChromHMM.rds")

#chromHMM tracks
#readRDS("chromhmm tracks/")

```

###Doing volcano plots

```{r}
#do volcano plot

volcano_plot_maker <- function(DMP,name1,name2){
  #volcano plot x axis is average delta beta and y axis is -log10padj
  #create a classification column
  if ("deltaB" %in% colnames(DMP)) {
    DMP <- DMP %>%
      mutate(Classification = case_when(
        (P.Value <= 0.05 & deltaB > 0.1) ~ "Hypermethylated",
        (P.Value <= 0.05 & deltaB < -0.1) ~ "Hypomethylated",
        TRUE ~ "Not Significant"
      ))
  } else if("deltadeltaB" %in% colnames(DMP)) {
    DMP <- DMP %>%
      mutate(Classification = case_when(
        (P.Value <= 0.05 & deltadeltaB > 0.1) ~ "Hypermethylated",
        (P.Value <= 0.05 & deltadeltaB < -0.1) ~ "Hypomethylated",
        TRUE ~ "Not Significant"
      )) %>%
      rename("deltaB" = "deltadeltaB")
}  #calculating the -log10(padj)
  DMP$log_adjP <- -log10(DMP$P.Value)
  
  #selecting points for geom text label
  gene_names <- annotation_file_filtered %>%
    rownames_to_column("probes") %>%
    select(c("probes","genesUniq")) 
  
  label_data <- DMP %>%
    rownames_to_column("probes") %>%
    filter(Classification %in% c("Hypermethylated", "Hypomethylated")) %>%
    group_by(Classification) %>%
    slice_max(order_by = abs(deltaB), n = 30) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    left_join(gene_names, by = "probes")
  
  #to add the counts
  ct <- table(DMP$Classification)
  
  #draw the plot
  p <- ggplot(DMP, aes(x = deltaB, y = log_adjP)) +
    geom_point(
    aes(color = Classification),
    size = 1.5,
    alpha = 0.7
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "Hypermethylated" = "#EE4E4E",
        "Hypomethylated" = "#2A629A",
        "Not Significant" = "#D3D3D3"
      ),
        labels = c(
      paste0("Hypermethylated (", ct["Hypermethylated"], ")"),
      paste0("Hypomethylated (", ct["Hypomethylated"], ")"),
      paste0("Not Significant (", ct["Not Significant"], ")")
    )
  )+
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.1,0.1), linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    labs(
    title = paste0("Differential Methylation \n",name1," compared to ",name2),
    x = "Delta Beta",
    y = "-log10(P-Value)",
    color = "Classification"
    ) +   # Increase plot margins if necessary
    ylim(0,NA) +
    theme_publish(base_size = 14, base_linewidth = 0.7)+
      theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.direction = "vertical",
      legend.text = element_text(size = 11)
    ) +
    geom_label_repel(
      data = label_data,
      aes(label = genesUniq),
      box.padding = unit(0.1, "lines"),
      segment.color = "#2B2A4C",
      max.overlaps= 20
    ) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Methylation Level", override.aes = list(size = 3)),alpha= FALSE)
  
  ggsave(file = paste0("volcano_plot_",name1,"_vs_",name2,".png"),
         plot = p,
         dpi = 300, 
         bg = "transparent", 
         width = 6, height =7)
    ggsave(file = paste0("volcano_plot_",name1,"_vs_",name2,".pdf"),
         plot = p,
         dpi = 300, 
         width = 6, height =7)
  }

# volcano_plot_maker(ra_and_oa_vs_healthy_list[[1]], "RA ", "Healthy ")
# volcano_plot_maker(ra_and_oa_vs_healthy_list[[3]], "OA ", "Healthy ")
# volcano_plot_maker(ra_and_oa_vs_healthy_list[[5]], "RA ", "OA ")

```


###Mapping to Illumina CpG annotations and enrichment

```{r}

#---------------------- Illumina CpG annotations
#prepare the data
RA_sig <- ra_and_oa_vs_healthy_list[["RA_vs_Healthy_DMPs_significant"]]
OA_sig <- ra_and_oa_vs_healthy_list[["OA_vs_Healthy_DMPs_significant"]]

RA_all <- ra_and_oa_vs_healthy_list[["RA_vs_Healthy_DMPs"]]
OA_all <- ra_and_oa_vs_healthy_list[["OA_vs_Healthy_DMPs"]]

# CpG IDs
RA_sig_cpg <- RA_sig$Row.names
OA_sig_cpg <- OA_sig$Row.names

# Direction subsets
RA_sig_hyper <- RA_sig %>% dplyr::filter(deltaB > 0)
RA_sig_hypo  <- RA_sig %>% dplyr::filter(deltaB < 0)

OA_sig_hyper <- OA_sig %>% dplyr::filter(deltaB > 0)
OA_sig_hypo  <- OA_sig %>% dplyr::filter(deltaB < 0)

# Shared / unique by CpG id
shared_cpg <- intersect(RA_sig_cpg, OA_sig_cpg)
RAuniq_cpg <- setdiff(RA_sig_cpg, OA_sig_cpg)
OAuniq_cpg <- setdiff(OA_sig_cpg, RA_sig_cpg)

# Keep only direction-consistent shared
shared_df <- dplyr::inner_join(
  RA_sig %>% dplyr::select(Row.names, deltaB) %>% dplyr::rename(deltaB_RA = deltaB),
  OA_sig %>% dplyr::select(Row.names, deltaB) %>% dplyr::rename(deltaB_OA = deltaB),
  by = "Row.names"
) %>% dplyr::filter(sign(deltaB_RA) == sign(deltaB_OA))

shared_cpg_dir <- shared_df$Row.names

# helper to extract a df subset by cpg list
subset_by_cpg <- function(df, cpg) df[df$Row.names %in% cpg, , drop=FALSE]

RAuniq_df <- subset_by_cpg(RA_sig, RAuniq_cpg)
OAuniq_df <- subset_by_cpg(OA_sig, OAuniq_cpg)
shared_df2 <- subset_by_cpg(RA_sig, shared_cpg_dir)  # use RA table as carrier for annotations

groups <- list(
  Shared_hyper = shared_df2 %>% dplyr::filter(deltaB > 0),
  Shared_hypo  = shared_df2 %>% dplyr::filter(deltaB < 0),
  RAuniq_hyper = RAuniq_df  %>% dplyr::filter(deltaB > 0),
  RAuniq_hypo  = RAuniq_df  %>% dplyr::filter(deltaB < 0),
  OAuniq_hyper = OAuniq_df  %>% dplyr::filter(deltaB > 0),
  OAuniq_hypo  = OAuniq_df  %>% dplyr::filter(deltaB < 0)
)

#define the background
all_cpg <- intersect(rownames(RA_all), rownames(OA_all)) #should be exactly the same

#plot it
plot_context_frac <- function(df, col, title) {

  df %>%
    mutate(val = .data[[col]]) %>%
    tidyr::separate_rows(val, sep=";") %>%
    filter(!is.na(val), val != "") %>%
    dplyr::count(val) %>%
    mutate(frac = n / sum(n)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = reorder(val, frac), y = frac, fill = frac)) +

    geom_col(width = 0.75) +

    scale_fill_viridis_c(
      option = "viridis",
      direction = -1,
      name = "Fraction"
    ) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = NULL,
      y = "Fraction of DMPs"
    ) +
  theme_publish(base_size = 14, base_linewidth = 0.7) +
        theme(legend.position = "right")

}

plot_context_frac(groups$RAuniq_hyper, "Relation_to_Island", "RA-unique hyper")

#all of them together
# Build a long dataframe from your list of group data.frames
make_context_long <- function(groups_list, col = "Relation_to_Island") {

  bind_rows(lapply(names(groups_list), function(g) {
    df <- groups_list[[g]]
    df %>%
      mutate(group = g,
             val = .data[[col]]) %>%
      separate_rows(val, sep=";") %>%
      filter(!is.na(val), val != "") %>%
      dplyr::count(group, val, name="n")
  })) %>%
    group_by(group) %>%
    mutate(frac = n / sum(n)) %>%
    ungroup()
}

ctx_long <- make_context_long(groups, col="Relation_to_Island")

ctx_long$val <- factor(ctx_long$val, levels = c("Island","Shore","Shelf","OpenSea"))
ctx_long$group <- factor(ctx_long$group, levels = c("Shared_hyper","Shared_hypo","RAuniq_hyper","RAuniq_hypo","OAuniq_hyper","OAuniq_hypo"))

p_ctx <- ggplot(ctx_long, aes(x = val, y = frac, fill = frac)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option="viridis", direction=-1, name="Fraction") +
  facet_wrap(~ group, ncol = 2) +
  labs(title="CpG island context across DMP groups",
       x=NULL, y="Fraction of DMPs") +
  theme_publish(base_size = 14, base_linewidth = 0.7) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, hjust=1))

ggsave(filename = "dmps_all_cpg_context.pdf",p_ctx, width = 6, height = 6)

#---------------------- Illumina CpG annotations Enrichment

bg_ann <- annotation_file_filtered %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Row.names") %>%
  filter(Row.names %in% all_cpg)

fisher_enr <- function(sig_cpg, bg_df, col) {
  # bg_df must have Row.names and col
  bg <- bg_df %>% select(Row.names, !!sym(col)) %>%
    tidyr::separate_rows(!!sym(col), sep=";") %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[col]]), .data[[col]] != "") %>%
    distinct(Row.names, .data[[col]])

  sig <- intersect(sig_cpg, bg$Row.names)
  cats <- sort(unique(bg[[col]]))

  res <- lapply(cats, function(ct) {
    in_cat <- bg$Row.names[bg[[col]] == ct]
    x11 <- sum(sig %in% in_cat)
    x12 <- length(sig) - x11
    bg_not_sig <- setdiff(unique(bg$Row.names), sig)
    x21 <- sum(bg_not_sig %in% in_cat)
    x22 <- length(bg_not_sig) - x21
    ft <- fisher.test(matrix(c(x11,x12,x21,x22), nrow=2, byrow=TRUE))
    data.frame(category=ct, OR=unname(ft$estimate), p=ft$p.value, sig_in_cat=x11)
  }) %>% bind_rows()

  res %>% mutate(FDR=p.adjust(p,"BH")) %>% arrange(FDR)
}

enr_RAuniq_hyper_island <- fisher_enr(groups$RAuniq_hyper$Row.names, bg_ann, "Relation_to_Island")
enr_RAuniq_hypo_island <- fisher_enr(groups$RAuniq_hypo$Row.names, bg_ann, "Relation_to_Island")
enr_OAuniq_hyper_island <- fisher_enr(groups$OAuniq_hyper$Row.names, bg_ann, "Relation_to_Island")
enr_OAuniq_hypo_island <- fisher_enr(groups$OAuniq_hypo$Row.names, bg_ann, "Relation_to_Island")
enr_Shared_hyper_island <- fisher_enr(groups$Shared_hyper$Row.names, bg_ann, "Relation_to_Island")
enr_Shared_hypo_island <- fisher_enr(groups$Shared_hypo$Row.names, bg_ann, "Relation_to_Island")


#plot it 

plot_enrichment <- function(enr_df, title, top = 15) {

  enr_df %>%
    slice_head(n = top) %>%
    ggplot(aes(
      x = reorder(category, OR),
      y = OR,
      fill = OR
    )) +

    geom_col(width = 0.75) +

    geom_hline(
      yintercept = 1,
      linetype = "dashed",
      linewidth = 0.8,
      color = "grey40"
    ) +

    scale_fill_viridis_c(
      option = "viridis",
      name = "Odds ratio"
    ) +

    coord_flip() +

    labs(
      title = title,
      x = NULL,
      y = "Odds ratio vs background"
    ) +

  theme_publish(base_size = 14, base_linewidth = 0.7) +
        theme(legend.position = "right")
}

plot_enrichment(enr_RAuniq_hyper_island, "RA-unique hyper – Island enrichment")

#all of them together
add_sig_stars <- function(fdr) {
  ifelse(fdr <= 1e-3, "***",
         ifelse(fdr <= 1e-2, "**",
                ifelse(fdr <= 5e-2, "*", "")))
}

enr_list <- list(
  Shared_hyper = enr_Shared_hyper_island,
  Shared_hypo  = enr_Shared_hypo_island,
  RAuniq_hyper = enr_RAuniq_hyper_island,
  RAuniq_hypo  = enr_RAuniq_hypo_island,
  OAuniq_hyper = enr_OAuniq_hyper_island,
  OAuniq_hypo  = enr_OAuniq_hypo_island
)

enr_all <- bind_rows(lapply(names(enr_list), function(g) {
  enr_list[[g]] %>%
    mutate(group = g,
           log2OR = log2(OR),
           neglog10FDR = -log10(FDR),
           sig = add_sig_stars(FDR))
}))

#do the factorization
enr_all$category <- factor(enr_all$category, levels = c("Island","Shore","Shelf","OpenSea"))

enr_all$group <- factor(enr_all$group, levels = c("Shared_hyper","Shared_hypo","RAuniq_hyper","RAuniq_hypo","OAuniq_hyper","OAuniq_hypo"))

#put the labels
enr_all <- enr_all %>%
  mutate(label_x = ifelse(log2OR >= 0, log2OR + 0.12, log2OR - 0.12),
         hjust_lab = ifelse(log2OR >= 0, 0, 1))

p_enr_bar <- ggplot(
  enr_all,
  aes(y = category, x = log2OR, fill = log2OR)
) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
             color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.15, 0.15))
    )+ 
  geom_text(aes(x = label_x, label = sig, hjust = hjust_lab),
            size = 5, color = "grey10") +

  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2166AC",   # depletion
    mid = "grey95",
    high = "#B2182B",  # enrichment
    midpoint = 0,
    name = expression(log[2]~OR)
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~ group, ncol = 2) +

  labs(
    title = "Enrichment of CpG island context (vs background)",
    x = "log2(Odds ratio) (0 = no enrichment)",
    y = NULL
  ) +

  theme_publish(base_size = 14, base_linewidth = 0.7) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

p_enr_bar

ggsave(filename = "dmps_all_cpg_context_enrichment.pdf",p_enr_bar, width = 8, height = 6)

```

###GO analysis on DMPs
using gometh from missmethyl library

```{r}
#example on one 
do_geo_analysis <- function(sig_loci, all_loci, string1, string2){
  
  #run geometh from miss methly
  gst <- gometh(sig.cpg=as.character(sig_loci$Row.names), 
              all.cpg=as.character(rownames(all_loci))) 
  gst$label <- ifelse(gst$FDR < 0.01, "< 0.01", round(gst$FDR, 2))

  #genomic.features = c("TSS1500","TSS200","1stExon") for promoters
  gst_updated_cc <- gst %>% 
    arrange(P.DE) %>% 
    filter(ONTOLOGY == "CC") %>%
    slice_head(n=20)
  
  gst_updated_mf <- gst %>% 
    arrange(P.DE) %>% 
    filter(ONTOLOGY == "MF") %>%
    slice_head(n=20)
  
  gst_updated_bp <- gst %>% 
    arrange(P.DE) %>% 
    filter(ONTOLOGY == "BP") %>%
    slice_head(n=20)
  
  #visualize it with bar plot
  title <- paste0(string1, string2)
  
  plt_bp <-ggplot(gst_updated_bp, aes(x = reorder(TERM, -DE), y = DE, fill = FDR)) +
        geom_bar(stat = "identity", alpha = 0.9, width = 0.7) +
        # geom_text(aes(y = DE + 0.5, label = label), 
        #     size = 5, hjust = 0, color = "black") +
        #or
        geom_text(aes(label = label, hjust = 1.1), size = 5, color = "white") +
        scale_fill_gradient(low = "#4575b4", high = "#d73027",
                            limits = c(0, max(gst_updated_bp$FDR, na.rm = TRUE)),
                            labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())) +
        coord_flip() +
        labs(title = paste0(title, " - Biological Process"),
             x = "Pathway", y = "Number of DMPs", fill = "FDR") +
        theme_publish(base_size = 14,base_linewidth = 0.7) +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
              legend.position = "bottom", legend.text = element_text(angle = 45))
  
  ggsave(filename = paste0(title, "_bp.png"),
           plot = plt_bp, width = 12, height = 6, bg = "transparent")
  ggsave(filename = paste0(title, "_bp.pdf"),
           plot = plt_bp, width = 12, height = 6)

  plt_mf <-ggplot(gst_updated_mf, aes(x = reorder(TERM, -DE), y = DE, fill = FDR)) +
        geom_bar(stat = "identity", alpha = 0.9, width = 0.7) +
        # geom_text(aes(y = DE + 0.5, label = label), 
        #     size = 5, hjust = 0, color = "black") +
        #or
        geom_text(aes(label = label, hjust = 1.1), size = 5, color = "white") +
        scale_fill_gradient(low = "#4575b4", high = "#d73027",
                            limits = c(0, max(gst_updated_mf$FDR, na.rm = TRUE)),
                            labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())) +
        coord_flip() +
        labs(title = paste0(title, " - Molecular Function"),
             x = "Pathway", y = "Number of DMPs", fill = "FDR") +
        theme_publish(base_size = 14,base_linewidth = 0.7) +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
              legend.position = "bottom", legend.text = element_text(angle = 45))
  
  ggsave(filename = paste0(title, "_mf.png"),
           plot = plt_mf, width = 12, height = 6, bg = "transparent")
  ggsave(filename = paste0(title, "_mf.pdf"),
           plot = plt_mf, width = 12, height = 6)


  plt_cc <-ggplot(gst_updated_cc, aes(x = reorder(TERM, -DE), y = DE, fill = FDR)) +
        geom_bar(stat = "identity", alpha = 0.9, width = 0.7) +
        # geom_text(aes(y = DE + 0.5, label = label),
        #     size = 5, hjust = 0, color = "black") +
        #or
        geom_text(aes(label = label, hjust = 1.1), size = 5, color = "white") +
        scale_fill_gradient(low = "#4575b4", high = "#d73027",
                            limits = c(0, max(gst_updated_cc$FDR, na.rm = TRUE)),
                            labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())) +
        coord_flip() +
        labs(title = paste0(title, " - Cellular Component"),
             x = "Pathway", y = "Number of DMPs", fill = "FDR") +
        theme_publish(base_size = 14,base_linewidth = 0.7) +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
              legend.position = "bottom", legend.text = element_text(angle = 45))
  
  ggsave(filename = paste0(title, "_cc.png"),
           plot = plt_cc, width = 12, height = 6, bg = "transparent")
  ggsave(filename = paste0(title, "_cc.pdf"),
           plot = plt_cc, width = 12, height = 6)

  
}

do_geo_analysis(ra_and_oa_vs_healthy_list[[2]], ra_and_oa_vs_healthy_list[[1]], "RA vs  " , "NIC " )
# do_geo_analysis(ra_and_oa_vs_healthy_list[[4]], ra_and_oa_vs_healthy_list[[3]], "OA vs " , "NIC" )

```

##DMRs related analysis
####Overview of the regions

```{r}
#read the dmr list
ra_and_oa_vs_healthy_dmr_list <- readRDS("outputs - after xy removal - open regions/RA_vs_Healthy_and_OA_vs_Healthy_dmr_results_filteredChromHMM.rds")

#filter the dmrs according to the abs betavalue diff >= 0.1 
filter_dmrs <- function(gr, abs_meandiff=0.1) {
  gr[
    abs(mcols(gr)$meandiff) >= abs_meandiff
  ]
}

RA_vs_Healthy_dmrs <- filter_dmrs(ra_and_oa_vs_healthy_dmr_list$RA_vs_Healthy)
#646 regions (was 4770 regions before effect size filtration)
OA_vs_Healthy_dmrs <- filter_dmrs(ra_and_oa_vs_healthy_dmr_list$OA_vs_Healthy)
#451 regions (was 2604 regions before effect size filtration)
RA_vs_OA_dmrs <- (ra_and_oa_vs_healthy_dmr_list$RA_vs_OA)
#1 region (was 4 before)

# Helper: direction split
split_dir <- function(gr) {
  list(
    hyper = gr[mcols(gr)$meandiff > 0],
    hypo  = gr[mcols(gr)$meandiff < 0]
  )
}

# Helper: count shared/unique based on overlap 
#(minimum overlap percentage doesnt matter, they are perfectly uniform)
count_shared_unique_strict <- function(A, B, min_frac = 1) {

  hits <- findOverlaps(A, B, ignore.strand = TRUE)

  ov <- pintersect(A[queryHits(hits)], B[subjectHits(hits)])

  frac <- width(ov) / pmin(
    width(A[queryHits(hits)]),
    width(B[subjectHits(hits)])
  )

  keep <- frac >= min_frac
  hits2 <- hits[keep]

  A_shared_idx <- unique(queryHits(hits2))
  B_shared_idx <- unique(subjectHits(hits2))

  list(
    shared = length(A_shared_idx),
    A_only = length(A) - length(A_shared_idx),
    B_only = length(B) - length(B_shared_idx)
  )
}

 #split them into hyper-, hypo-methylated
ra_split <- split_dir(RA_vs_Healthy_dmrs)
oa_split <- split_dir(OA_vs_Healthy_dmrs)

hyper_counts <- count_shared_unique_strict(ra_split$hyper, oa_split$hyper)
hypo_counts  <- count_shared_unique_strict(ra_split$hypo,  oa_split$hypo)

plot_df_dmr <- tibble(
  Methylation = rep(c("Hyper", "Hypo"), each = 3),
  Categories  = rep(c("RA only", "OA only", "Shared"), 2),
  Count = c(hyper_counts$A_only, hyper_counts$B_only, hyper_counts$shared,
            hypo_counts$A_only,  hypo_counts$B_only,  hypo_counts$shared)
) %>%
  group_by(Methylation) %>%
  mutate(
    Total = sum(Count),
    Percent = Count / Total * 100,
    Label = sprintf("%d\n(%.1f%%)", Count, Percent)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

bar_plot_dmr <- ggplot(plot_df_dmr, aes(x = Methylation, y = Count, fill = Categories)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label = Label),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            size = 5,
            color = "grey10") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "RA only" = "#A888B5",
    "OA only" = "#C5D3E8",
    "Shared" = "#F7DB91"
  )) +
  ylab("Number of DMRs") +
  xlab("") +
  theme_publish(base_size = 15, base_linewidth = 0.6) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "right")

ggsave(filename = "bar_plot_ra_oa_dmrs.pdf",bar_plot_dmr, width = 6, height = 6)

#extract the unique and shared regions
extract_sets_keep_original <- function(RA_gr, OA_gr) {
  hits <- findOverlaps(RA_gr, OA_gr, ignore.strand = TRUE)

  RA_shared_idx <- unique(queryHits(hits))
  OA_shared_idx <- unique(subjectHits(hits))

  list(
    Shared = RA_gr[RA_shared_idx],   # original RA regions overlapping OA 
    RA_only   = RA_gr[-RA_shared_idx],

   # OA_shared = OA_gr[OA_shared_idx],   # original OA regions overlapping RA
   # this is always exactly the same as RA_shared
    OA_only   = OA_gr[-OA_shared_idx],

    hits = hits
  )
}

# Use direction splits (metadata is intact)
res_hyper <- extract_sets_keep_original(ra_split$hyper, oa_split$hyper)
res_hypo  <- extract_sets_keep_original(ra_split$hypo,  oa_split$hypo)

```

###DMR annotation using annotatr library

```{r}
#examples of builtin annotations from this library ->  builtin_annotations()

#load annotations
#note that these are mostly for protein coding genes, some information on niche non coding RNAs could not be found
annotations <- c(
  "hg38_enhancers_fantom",
  "hg38_genes_promoters",
  "hg38_genes_1to5kb",
  "hg38_genes_5UTRs",
  "hg38_genes_exons",
  "hg38_genes_introns",
  "hg38_genes_3UTRs",
  "hg38_genes_intergenic"
)
annot_dmr <- build_annotations(genome = 'hg38', annotations = annotations)

#annotate the dmrs, collapse the annotations, rename the regions for better readability
#then make a binary matrix ready-to-use for upset plotting 
annotate_dmrs <- function(dmr_gr){
  
  region_df <- as.data.frame(dmr_gr) %>%
    transmute(
      seqnames, start, end,
      region_id = paste0(seqnames, ":", start, "-", end),
      min_smoothed_fdr,
      meandiff,
      no.cpgs,
      width
    )

  annotated <- annotate_regions(regions = dmr_gr, annotations = annot_dmr, ignore.strand = TRUE)

  ann_df <- as.data.frame(annotated) %>%
    transmute(
      seqnames, start, end,
      region_id = paste0(seqnames, ":", start, "-", end),
      annot.type,
      annot.symbol
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      annot.type = case_when(
        annot.type == "hg38_genes_promoters"  ~ "Promoter",
        annot.type == "hg38_genes_intergenic" ~ "Intergenic",
        annot.type == "hg38_enhancers_fantom" ~ "Enhancer",
        annot.type %in% c("hg38_genes_5UTRs","hg38_genes_3UTRs","hg38_genes_introns","hg38_genes_exons") ~ "Genic",
        annot.type == "hg38_genes_1to5kb" ~ "Upstream Regulatory",
        TRUE ~ annot.type
      )
    ) %>%
    distinct()

  # Join back DMRcate stats
  ann_df <- ann_df %>%
    left_join(region_df, by = c("region_id","seqnames","start","end"))

  # build binary matrix
  dmr_annotations <- ann_df %>%
    select(region_id, annot.type) %>%
    distinct() %>%
    mutate(present = 1) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = annot.type, values_from = present, values_fill = 0)

  # add regions with zero hits
  missing_ids <- setdiff(region_df$region_id, dmr_annotations$region_id)
  if (length(missing_ids) > 0) {
    missing_mat <- data.frame(region_id = missing_ids)
    dmr_annotations <- dplyr::bind_rows(dmr_annotations, missing_mat)
  }

  # ensure Unannotated exists
  annot_cols <- setdiff(colnames(dmr_annotations), "region_id")
  if (!"Unannotated" %in% colnames(dmr_annotations)) dmr_annotations$Unannotated <- 0
  if (length(annot_cols) > 0) {
    hit_sum <- rowSums(dmr_annotations[, annot_cols, drop=FALSE], na.rm=TRUE)
    dmr_annotations$Unannotated[is.na(hit_sum) | hit_sum == 0] <- 1
  } else {
    dmr_annotations$Unannotated <- 1
  }
  #probably doesnt matter, I havent seen unannotated regions

  upset_data <- dmr_annotations %>% select(-region_id) %>% as.data.frame()

  list(
    dmr_with_annotations = ann_df,         # long format
    dmr_binary = dmr_annotations,          # includes region_id
    upset_data = upset_data
  )
}

#do annotations for all groups
ann_shared_hyper <- annotate_dmrs(res_hyper$Shared)
ann_raonly_hyper <- annotate_dmrs(res_hyper$RA_only)
ann_oaonly_hyper <- annotate_dmrs(res_hyper$OA_only)

ann_shared_hypo <- annotate_dmrs(res_hypo$Shared)
ann_raonly_hypo <- annotate_dmrs(res_hypo$RA_only)
ann_oaonly_hypo <- annotate_dmrs(res_hypo$OA_only)

#put all of them together
df_all <- bind_rows(
  ann_shared_hyper$dmr_with_annotations %>% mutate(set="Shared_hyper"),
  ann_raonly_hyper$dmr_with_annotations %>% mutate(set="RAonly_hyper"),
  ann_oaonly_hyper$dmr_with_annotations %>% mutate(set="OAonly_hyper"),
  ann_shared_hypo$dmr_with_annotations %>% mutate(set="Shared_hypo"),
  ann_raonly_hypo$dmr_with_annotations %>% mutate(set="RAonly_hypo"),
  ann_oaonly_hypo$dmr_with_annotations %>% mutate(set="OAonly_hypo")
)

#get a summary
summary_tbl <- df_all %>%
  dplyr::count(set, annot.type) %>%
  group_by(set) %>%
  mutate(frac = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

summary_tbl
```

#####Upset Plot with annotated DMRs

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# Annotatr UpSet plots (Supplementary Fig. 2)
# 6 panels: Shared_hyper / Shared_hypo / RAuniq_hyper / RAuniq_hypo / OAuniq_hyper / OAuniq_hypo
# using ComplexUpset + patchwork
# -----------------------------

set_names <- c("Genic","Promoter","Upstream Regulatory","Intergenic","Enhancer")

# Ensure all expected annotation columns exist and are logical (ComplexUpset works best with logicals)
prep_upset_df <- function(df_in, set_names) {

  df_out <- df_in

  # add missing columns as 0
  for (s in set_names) if (!s %in% colnames(df_out)) df_out[[s]] <- 0

  # keep only these columns, force logical, add row id
  df_out <- df_out[, set_names, drop = FALSE]
  df_out[] <- lapply(df_out, function(x) as.logical(as.integer(x)))
  df_out$.id <- seq_len(nrow(df_out))

  df_out
}

make_upset_plot <- function(df_in, title, set_names, n_intersections = 10) {

  df_plot <- prep_upset_df(df_in, set_names)

  ComplexUpset::upset(
    df_plot,
    intersect = set_names,
    base_annotations = list(
      "Intersection size" = intersection_size(text = list(size = 3))
    ),
    set_sizes = upset_set_size(),
    n_intersections = n_intersections
  ) +
    ggtitle(title) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      legend.position = "none"
    )
}

# -----------------------------
# Combine hyper + hypo within each category (row-bind)
# -----------------------------
shared_df <- bind_rows(ann_shared_hyper$upset_data, ann_shared_hypo$upset_data)
raonly_df <- bind_rows(ann_raonly_hyper$upset_data, ann_raonly_hypo$upset_data)
oaonly_df <- bind_rows(ann_oaonly_hyper$upset_data, ann_oaonly_hypo$upset_data)

upset_list3 <- list(
  Shared  = shared_df,
  `RA only` = raonly_df,
  `OA only` = oaonly_df
)

plots3 <- imap(upset_list3, ~ make_upset_plot(.x, .y, set_names, n_intersections = 10))

p_sup2 <- wrap_plots(plots3, ncol = 3)

p_sup2

ggsave("annotatr_upset_shared_RAonly_OAonly.pdf", p_sup2, width = 15, height = 5)

```

###DMR annotation with ChromHMM Tracks from fibroblasts

```{r}
#-----------------------------------------------------------
# Load ChromHMM tracks
#-----------------------------------------------------------
ra_knee_chromhmm_df      <- read.table("chromhmm tracks/ra_knee_368.bed", sep="\t", header=FALSE, stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
oa_knee_chromhmm_df      <- read.table("chromhmm tracks/oa_knee_335.bed", sep="\t", header=FALSE, stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
healthy_knee_chromhmm_df <- read.table("chromhmm tracks/healthy_knee_88.bed", sep="\t", header=FALSE, stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
ra_hand_chromhmm_df      <- read.table("chromhmm tracks/female_ra_hand_316.bed", sep="\t", header=FALSE, stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
oa_thumb_chromhmm_df     <- read.table("chromhmm tracks/oa_thumb_343.bed", sep="\t", header=FALSE, stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
ra_shoulder_chromhmm_df  <- read.table("chromhmm tracks/ra_shoulder_341.bed", sep="\t", header=FALSE, stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
oa_shoulder_chromhmm_df  <- read.table("chromhmm tracks/shoulder_oa_384.bed", sep="\t", header=FALSE, stringsAsFactors=FALSE)

#-----------------------------------------------------------
# ChromHMM state mapping
#-----------------------------------------------------------
chromhmm_state_map <- data.frame(
  state = paste0("E", 1:18),
  label = c(
    "Active TSS","Flanking Active TSS","Transcription at gene 5′ and 3′",
    "Strong transcription","Weak transcription","Genic enhancer",
    "Enhancer 1","Enhancer 2","Bivalent/Poised TSS","Bivalent enhancer",
    "Repressed PolyComb","ZNF genes & repeats","Heterochromatin",
    "Quiescent/Low","Repetitive/Quiescent","Weak promoter/poised",
    "Weak enhancer","Repressed/CTCF"
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

open_states <- c(
  "Active TSS","Flanking Active TSS","Genic enhancer","Enhancer 1","Enhancer 2",
  "Strong transcription","Weak transcription","Weak enhancer","Weak promoter/poised",
  "Transcription at gene 5′ and 3′"
)

# ===========================================================
# ChromHMM integration for DMRs (dominant-state assignment)
# Functions:
#  - build_chromhmm_gr()
#  - assign_dmr_state_per_track()
#  - summarize_state_variability()
#  - enrichment_fisher_dominant()
# ===========================================================

# -----------------------------
# 1) Build ChromHMM GRanges with 18-state labels + collapsed class
# -----------------------------
collapse_state_class <- function(label) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    label %in% c("Active TSS", "Flanking Active TSS", "Weak promoter/poised", "Bivalent/Poised TSS") ~ "Promoter/TSS",
    label %in% c("Genic enhancer", "Enhancer 1", "Enhancer 2", "Weak enhancer", "Bivalent enhancer") ~ "Enhancer",
    label %in% c("Strong transcription", "Weak transcription", "Transcription at gene 5′ and 3′") ~ "Transcription",
    label %in% c("Repressed PolyComb") ~ "Polycomb/Repressed",
    label %in% c("Repressed/CTCF") ~ "CTCF/Repressed",
    label %in% c("Quiescent/Low", "Heterochromatin", "ZNF genes & repeats", "Repetitive/Quiescent") ~ "Quiescent/Other",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )
}

build_chromhmm_gr <- function(track_df, state_map, track_name = NA_character_) {
  stopifnot(ncol(track_df) >= 4)
  colnames(track_df)[1:4] <- c("chr","start","end","state")

  df <- track_df %>%
    dplyr::select(chr, start, end, state) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      state = as.character(state),
      start = as.integer(start),
      end   = as.integer(end)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(state_map, by = "state") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      label = ifelse(is.na(label), state, label),
      class = collapse_state_class(label),
      track = track_name
    )

  GRanges(
    seqnames = df$chr,
    ranges   = IRanges(start = df$start, end = df$end),
    state    = df$state,
    label    = df$label,
    class    = df$class,
    track    = df$track
  )
}

# -----------------------------
# 2) Assign dominant ChromHMM state to each DMR for one track
#    (dominant = max bp overlap; ties broken by first max)
# -----------------------------
assign_dmr_state_per_track <- function(dmrs_gr, track_gr, track_name = NULL) {

  if (is.null(track_name)) {
    track_name <- unique(mcols(track_gr)$track)
    if (length(track_name) != 1) track_name <- "track"
  }

  dmrs_gr <- dmrs_gr
  mcols(dmrs_gr)$dmr_id <- paste0(seqnames(dmrs_gr), ":", start(dmrs_gr), "-", end(dmrs_gr))

  hits <- findOverlaps(dmrs_gr, track_gr, ignore.strand = TRUE)
  if (length(hits) == 0) {
    # return NA assignments for all DMRs
    return(tibble(
      dmr_id = mcols(dmrs_gr)$dmr_id,
      track  = track_name,
      dom_label = NA_character_,
      dom_class = NA_character_,
      dom_state = NA_character_,
      dom_bp = 0L,
      dmr_width = width(dmrs_gr),
      frac_covered = 0
    ))
  }

  q <- queryHits(hits)
  s <- subjectHits(hits)

  ov <- pintersect(dmrs_gr[q], track_gr[s])
  ov_bp <- width(ov)

  ov_df <- tibble(
    dmr_id    = mcols(dmrs_gr)$dmr_id[q],
    track     = track_name,
    label     = as.character(mcols(track_gr)$label[s]),
    class     = as.character(mcols(track_gr)$class[s]),
    state     = as.character(mcols(track_gr)$state[s]),
    ov_bp     = as.integer(ov_bp)
  ) %>%
    group_by(dmr_id, track, label, class, state) %>%
    summarise(ov_bp = sum(ov_bp), .groups = "drop")

  # pick dominant label by max ov_bp per dmr
  dom <- ov_df %>%
    group_by(dmr_id, track) %>%
    slice_max(order_by = ov_bp, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    rename(dom_label = label, dom_class = class, dom_state = state, dom_bp = ov_bp)

  # add width and coverage fraction (bp covered by ANY segment in this track)
  covered <- ov_df %>%
    group_by(dmr_id, track) %>%
    summarise(covered_bp = sum(ov_bp), .groups = "drop")

  base <- tibble(
    dmr_id = mcols(dmrs_gr)$dmr_id,
    dmr_width = width(dmrs_gr)
  )

  out <- base %>%
    left_join(dom, by = "dmr_id") %>%
    left_join(covered, by = c("dmr_id","track")) %>%
    mutate(
      track = ifelse(is.na(track), track_name, track),
      covered_bp = ifelse(is.na(covered_bp), 0L, covered_bp),
      frac_covered = covered_bp / dmr_width
    )

  out
}

# -----------------------------
# 3) Summarize state variability across tracks for each DMR
#    (entropy + majority class fraction + number of classes)
# -----------------------------
summarize_state_variability <- function(assignments_df) {
  # assignments_df: dmr_id, track, dom_class, dom_label ...
  df <- assignments_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(dom_class)) %>%
    group_by(dmr_id) %>%
    summarise(
      n_tracks = n(),
      n_classes = n_distinct(dom_class),
      majority_class = names(sort(table(dom_class), decreasing = TRUE))[1],
      majority_frac  = max(table(dom_class)) / n(),
      entropy = {
        p <- prop.table(table(dom_class))
        -sum(p * log2(p))
      },
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  df
}

# -----------------------------
# 4) Fisher enrichment on dominant class/label vs background
#    Foreground + background are assignment tables (dominant per DMR per track)
#    We usually summarize per DMR by majority across tracks first.
# -----------------------------
majority_call <- function(assignments_df, field = c("dom_class","dom_label")) {
  field <- match.arg(field)
  assignments_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[field]])) %>%
    group_by(dmr_id) %>%
    summarise(
      call = names(sort(table(.data[[field]]), decreasing = TRUE))[1],
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

enrichment_fisher_dominant <- function(fg_assign, bg_assign, field = c("dom_class","dom_label")) {
  field <- match.arg(field)

  fg_call <- majority_call(fg_assign, field = field)
  bg_call <- majority_call(bg_assign, field = field)

  # universe = all background DMR ids
  universe <- unique(bg_call$dmr_id)
  fg_ids <- intersect(unique(fg_call$dmr_id), universe)

  cats <- sort(unique(bg_call$call))

  res <- lapply(cats, function(ct) {
    bg_in_ct <- bg_call$dmr_id[bg_call$call == ct]

    x11 <- sum(fg_ids %in% bg_in_ct)               # foreground in category
    x12 <- length(fg_ids) - x11                    # foreground not in category
    bg_not_fg <- setdiff(universe, fg_ids)
    x21 <- sum(bg_not_fg %in% bg_in_ct)            # background-only in category
    x22 <- length(bg_not_fg) - x21                 # background-only not in category

    ft <- fisher.test(matrix(c(x11,x12,x21,x22), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE))

    data.frame(
      category = ct,
      OR = unname(ft$estimate),
      p = ft$p.value,
      fg_in_cat = x11,
      fg_total  = length(fg_ids),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }) %>% bind_rows() %>%
    mutate(FDR = p.adjust(p, "BH")) %>%
    arrange(FDR)

  res
}

# ===========================================================
# Build track GRanges 
# ===========================================================
chrom_gr_list <- list(
  RA_knee      = build_chromhmm_gr(ra_knee_chromhmm_df,      chromhmm_state_map, "RA_knee"),
  OA_knee      = build_chromhmm_gr(oa_knee_chromhmm_df,      chromhmm_state_map, "OA_knee"),
  Healthy_knee = build_chromhmm_gr(healthy_knee_chromhmm_df, chromhmm_state_map, "Healthy_knee"),
  RA_hand      = build_chromhmm_gr(ra_hand_chromhmm_df,      chromhmm_state_map, "RA_hand"),
  OA_thumb     = build_chromhmm_gr(oa_thumb_chromhmm_df,     chromhmm_state_map, "OA_thumb"),
  RA_shoulder  = build_chromhmm_gr(ra_shoulder_chromhmm_df,  chromhmm_state_map, "RA_shoulder"),
  OA_shoulder  = build_chromhmm_gr(oa_shoulder_chromhmm_df,  chromhmm_state_map, "OA_shoulder")
)

# ===========================================================
# Assign dominant states for each DMR group across all tracks
# ===========================================================
assign_across_tracks <- function(dmrs_gr, chrom_gr_list) {
  bind_rows(lapply(names(chrom_gr_list), function(nm) {
    assign_dmr_state_per_track(dmrs_gr, chrom_gr_list[[nm]], track_name = nm)
  }))
}

assign_shared_hyper <- assign_across_tracks(res_hyper$Shared, chrom_gr_list)
assign_shared_hypo  <- assign_across_tracks(res_hypo$Shared,  chrom_gr_list)

assign_raonly_hyper <- assign_across_tracks(res_hyper$RA_only, chrom_gr_list)
assign_raonly_hypo  <- assign_across_tracks(res_hypo$RA_only,  chrom_gr_list)

assign_oaonly_hyper <- assign_across_tracks(res_hyper$OA_only, chrom_gr_list)
assign_oaonly_hypo  <- assign_across_tracks(res_hypo$OA_only,  chrom_gr_list)

# ===========================================================
# Variability summaries (entropy/majority fraction etc.)
# ===========================================================
var_shared_hyper <- summarize_state_variability(assign_shared_hyper)
var_shared_hypo <- summarize_state_variability(assign_shared_hypo)

var_raonly_hyper <- summarize_state_variability(assign_raonly_hyper)
var_raonly_hypo<- summarize_state_variability(assign_raonly_hypo)

var_oaonly_hyper <- summarize_state_variability(assign_oaonly_hyper)
var_oaonly_hypo <- summarize_state_variability(assign_oaonly_hypo)

# ===========================================================
# Visualize Dominant Class Distribution Across Tracks
# ===========================================================

# combine assignment tables
assign_all <- bind_rows(
  assign_shared_hyper %>% mutate(fg_set="Shared_hyper"),
  assign_shared_hypo  %>% mutate(fg_set="Shared_hypo"),
  assign_raonly_hyper %>% mutate(fg_set="RA_only_hyper"),
  assign_raonly_hypo  %>% mutate(fg_set="RA_only_hypo"),
  assign_oaonly_hyper %>% mutate(fg_set="OA_only_hyper"),
  assign_oaonly_hypo  %>% mutate(fg_set="OA_only_hypo")
)

fg_levels <- c("Shared_hyper","Shared_hypo","RA_only_hyper","RA_only_hypo","OA_only_hyper","OA_only_hypo")
class_levels <- c("Promoter/TSS","Enhancer","Transcription","CTCF/Repressed","Polycomb/Repressed","Quiescent/Other")
track_levels <- c("Healthy_knee","RA_knee","RA_shoulder","RA_hand","OA_knee","OA_shoulder","OA_thumb")

assign_all2 <- assign_all %>%
  mutate(
    fg_set = factor(fg_set, levels = fg_levels),
    dom_class = factor(dom_class, levels = class_levels),
    track = factor(track, levels = track_levels)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(dom_class))

dist_tbl <- assign_all2 %>%
  dplyr::count(fg_set, track, dom_class, name="n") %>%
  group_by(fg_set, track) %>%
  mutate(frac = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

p_domclass_bytrack <- ggplot(dist_tbl, aes(x = track, y = frac, fill = dom_class)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.85) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option="plasma", end=0.9, name="Dominant class", direction = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ fg_set, ncol = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Dominant ChromHMM class per track",
    x = NULL, y = "Fraction of DMRs"
  ) +
  theme_publish(base_size = 13, base_linewidth = 0.6) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    strip.text = element_text(face="bold")
  )
ggsave("chromHMM_majority_frac.pdf", p_domclass_bytrack, width=9, height=7)

# ===========================================================
# Visualize Variability Across Tracks (Stability of Chromatin Annotation)
# ===========================================================

var_all <- bind_rows(
  var_shared_hyper %>% mutate(fg_set="Shared_hyper"),
  var_shared_hypo  %>% mutate(fg_set="Shared_hypo"),
  var_raonly_hyper %>% mutate(fg_set="RA_only_hyper"),
  var_raonly_hypo  %>% mutate(fg_set="RA_only_hypo"),
  var_oaonly_hyper %>% mutate(fg_set="OA_only_hyper"),
  var_oaonly_hypo  %>% mutate(fg_set="OA_only_hypo")
) %>%
  mutate(
    fg_set = factor(fg_set, levels = fg_levels),
    majority_frac = as.numeric(majority_frac)
  )

mf_tbl <- var_all %>%
  dplyr::count(fg_set, majority_frac) %>%
  group_by(fg_set) %>%
  mutate(frac = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

p_majority_frac <- ggplot(mf_tbl, aes(x = factor(majority_frac), y = frac, fill = frac)) +
  geom_col(width=0.85) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option="D", end=0.9, name="Fraction") +
  facet_wrap(~ fg_set, ncol=3) +
  labs(
    title = "Stability of dominant class across tracks",
    x = "Majority fraction (fraction of tracks sharing the same dominant class)",
    y = "Fraction of DMRs"
  ) +
  theme_publish(base_size = 13, base_linewidth = 0.6) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, hjust=1),
    legend.position="right",
    strip.text = element_text(face="bold")
  )

p_majority_frac

# ===========================================================
# Visualize Entropy Distribution (Stability of Chromatin Annotation)
# ===========================================================

# Map fg_set -> direction + set_type (Shared/RA_only/OA_only)
var_plot <- var_all %>%
  mutate(
    direction = ifelse(grepl("_hyper$", fg_set), "Hyper", "Hypo"),
    set_type  = dplyr::case_when(
      grepl("^Shared_", fg_set) ~ "Shared",
      grepl("^RA_only_", fg_set) ~ "RA_only",
      grepl("^OA_only_", fg_set) ~ "OA_only",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(set_type)) %>%
  mutate(
    direction = factor(direction, levels = c("Hyper","Hypo")),
    set_type  = factor(set_type, levels = c("Shared","RA_only","OA_only"))
  )

# Kruskal–Wallis per direction
kw_tbl <- var_plot %>%
  group_by(direction) %>%
  kruskal_test(entropy ~ set_type) %>%
  ungroup()

p_entropy <- ggplot(var_plot, aes(x = set_type, y = entropy, fill = set_type)) +
  geom_violin(scale = "width", trim = TRUE, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.18, outlier.size = 0.6, alpha = 0.9) +
  facet_wrap(~ direction, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +
  
  # KW p-value inside each facet
  ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(
    kw_tbl %>% mutate(
      group1 = "Shared", group2 = "OA_only",
      y.position = max(var_plot$entropy, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.08,
      label = paste0("Kruskal-Wallis p = ", signif(p, 2))
    ),
    label = "label",
    xmin = "group1", xmax = "group2",
    y.position = "y.position",
    tip.length = 0,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option="D", begin = 0.2, end=0.9)+
  
  labs(
    title = "ChromHMM dominant-class variability across tracks",
    x = NULL, y = "Entropy (dominant class across tracks)"
  ) +
  theme_publish(base_size = 13, base_linewidth = 0.6) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave("chromHMM_dominant_tracks_entropy.pdf", p_entropy, width=6, height=4)

# ===========================================================
# Enrichment vs background universe
# Use background = all candidate DMRcate regions BEFORE effect-size filter
# ===========================================================

bg_RA = ra_and_oa_vs_healthy_dmr_list$RA_vs_Healthy  # (FDR<=0.05 set)
bg_OA = ra_and_oa_vs_healthy_dmr_list$OA_vs_Healthy

hits_bg <- findOverlaps(bg_RA, bg_OA, ignore.strand=TRUE)

bg_shared <- unique(c(
  bg_RA[queryHits(hits_bg)],
  bg_OA[subjectHits(hits_bg)]
))

# ===========================================================
# Background assignments
# ===========================================================

assign_bg_RA     <- assign_across_tracks(bg_RA, chrom_gr_list)
assign_bg_OA     <- assign_across_tracks(bg_OA, chrom_gr_list)
assign_bg_shared <- assign_across_tracks(bg_shared, chrom_gr_list)

# ===========================================================
# Helper: package enrichment results (adds log2OR + stars)
# ===========================================================

add_sig_stars <- function(fdr) {
  ifelse(fdr <= 1e-3, "***",
         ifelse(fdr <= 1e-2, "**",
                ifelse(fdr <= 5e-2, "*", "")))
}

prep_enr_tbl <- function(res, fg_name, bg_name) {
  res %>%
    mutate(
      fg_set = fg_name,
      bg_set = bg_name,
      log2OR = log2(OR),
      neglog10FDR = -log10(FDR),
      sig = add_sig_stars(FDR)
    )
}

# ===========================================================
# Run enrichment (dominant collapsed ChromHMM class)
# Prefer contrast-matched backgrounds:
#   - RA-only and Shared vs RA background
#   - OA-only and Shared vs OA background
# ===========================================================

#do enrichments 
enr_ra_hyper  <- enrichment_fisher_dominant(assign_raonly_hyper, assign_bg_RA, field="dom_class") %>%
  prep_enr_tbl("RA_only_hyper", "bg_RA")

enr_ra_hypo   <- enrichment_fisher_dominant(assign_raonly_hypo,  assign_bg_RA, field="dom_class") %>%
  prep_enr_tbl("RA_only_hypo", "bg_RA")

enr_oa_hyper  <- enrichment_fisher_dominant(assign_oaonly_hyper, assign_bg_OA, field="dom_class") %>%
  prep_enr_tbl("OA_only_hyper", "bg_OA")

enr_oa_hypo   <- enrichment_fisher_dominant(assign_oaonly_hypo,  assign_bg_OA, field="dom_class") %>%
  prep_enr_tbl("OA_only_hypo", "bg_OA")

enr_shared_hyper <- enrichment_fisher_dominant(assign_shared_hyper, assign_bg_shared, field="dom_class") %>%
  prep_enr_tbl("Shared_hyper", "bg_shared")

enr_shared_hypo  <- enrichment_fisher_dominant(assign_shared_hypo,  assign_bg_shared, field="dom_class") %>%
  prep_enr_tbl("Shared_hypo", "bg_shared")

enr_class_dir_all <- bind_rows(
  enr_shared_hyper, enr_shared_hypo,
  enr_ra_hyper, enr_ra_hypo,
  enr_oa_hyper, enr_oa_hypo
)

enr_class_dir_all

# ===========================================================
# Do Plotting
# ===========================================================

class_levels <- c(
  "Promoter/TSS", "Enhancer", "Transcription",
  "CTCF/Repressed", "Polycomb/Repressed", "Quiescent/Other"
)

fg_levels <- c("Shared_hyper","Shared_hypo","RA_only_hyper","RA_only_hypo","OA_only_hyper","OA_only_hypo")
bg_levels <- c("bg_RA","bg_OA","bg_shared")


enr_class_plot <- enr_class_dir_all %>%
  mutate(
    category = factor(category, levels = class_levels),
    fg_set   = factor(fg_set, levels = fg_levels),
    bg_set   = factor(bg_set, levels = bg_levels),
    sig      = add_sig_stars(FDR),
    # star placement
    log2OR_raw = log2OR,
    #if it is infinite make it finite (3.5 is the highest it can get)
    log2OR = ifelse(is.infinite(log2OR) & log2OR < 0, -3.5, log2OR), 
    log2OR = ifelse(is.infinite(log2OR) & log2OR > 0,  3.5, log2OR),
    label_x  = ifelse(log2OR >= 0, log2OR + 0.12, log2OR - 0.12),
    hjust_lab = ifelse(log2OR >= 0, 0, 1)
  )


p_chromhmm_enr <- ggplot(
  enr_class_plot,
  aes(y = category, x = log2OR, fill = log2OR)
) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
             color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.10, 0.10))) +
  geom_text(aes(x = label_x, label = sig, hjust = hjust_lab),
            size = 5, color = "grey10") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2166AC",   # depletion
    mid = "grey95",
    high = "#B2182B",  # enrichment
    midpoint = 0,
    name = expression(log[2]~OR)
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ fg_set, ncol = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Enrichment of dominant ChromHMM classes (vs DMRcate background)",
    x = "log2(Odds ratio) (0 = no enrichment)",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_publish(base_size = 14, base_linewidth = 0.7) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

p_chromhmm_enr
ggsave("dmrs_chromhmm_class_enrichment.pdf", p_chromhmm_enr, width = 9, height = 6)


```

#####DMR annotation for Upper-Lower Joint DMRs (add-on chunk)
uses the functions described above, performs the same workflow but for UL joint DMRs
```{r}
# ===========================================================
# UL (RA+OA) DMRs: ChromHMM dominant-class enrichment
# bg_UL is the UL DMRcate universe BEFORE effect-size filtering
# ===========================================================

# -----------------------------
# 1) Load background universe (pre-filter UL candidate regions; hg38)
# -----------------------------
ul_bg_list <- readRDS("outputs - after xy removal - open regions/RA_OA_upper_vs_lower_DMRs_filteredChromHMM.rds")
bg_UL <- ul_bg_list$Upper_vs_Lower_hg38

# -----------------------------
# 2) Make the foreground (effect-size filtered UL DMRs)
# -----------------------------
#filter the dmrs according to the abs betavalue diff >= 0.1 
filter_dmrs <- function(gr, abs_meandiff=0.1) {
  gr[
    abs(mcols(gr)$meandiff) >= abs_meandiff
  ]
}
fg_UL <- filter_dmrs(bg_UL)

# ===========================================================
# UL (RA+OA) DMRs: dominant ChromHMM-class enrichment
# - NO Healthy_knee track used
# - dominant class = majority across RA+OA tracks only
# ===========================================================

# 1) Build ChromHMM GRanges list WITHOUT Healthy_knee
chrom_gr_list_UL <- list(
  RA_knee     = build_chromhmm_gr(ra_knee_chromhmm_df,     chromhmm_state_map, "RA_knee"),
  RA_hand     = build_chromhmm_gr(ra_hand_chromhmm_df,     chromhmm_state_map, "RA_hand"),
  RA_shoulder = build_chromhmm_gr(ra_shoulder_chromhmm_df, chromhmm_state_map, "RA_shoulder"),
  OA_knee     = build_chromhmm_gr(oa_knee_chromhmm_df,     chromhmm_state_map, "OA_knee"),
  OA_thumb    = build_chromhmm_gr(oa_thumb_chromhmm_df,    chromhmm_state_map, "OA_thumb"),
  OA_shoulder = build_chromhmm_gr(oa_shoulder_chromhmm_df, chromhmm_state_map, "OA_shoulder")
)

# 2) Assign dominant state per DMR per track (disease tracks only)
assign_UL_fg <- assign_across_tracks(fg_UL, chrom_gr_list_UL)
assign_UL_bg <- assign_across_tracks(bg_UL, chrom_gr_list_UL)

# 3) Fisher enrichment on majority dominant class across tracks (fg vs bg)
enr_UL <- enrichment_fisher_dominant(assign_UL_fg, assign_UL_bg, field = "dom_class") %>%
  prep_enr_tbl("Upper_vs_Lower", "bg_UL")

# 4) Plot (same style as Fig 2b)
class_levels <- c("Promoter/TSS","Enhancer","Transcription","CTCF/Repressed","Polycomb/Repressed","Quiescent/Other")

enr_UL_plot <- enr_UL %>%
  mutate(
    category = factor(category, levels = class_levels),
    fg_set   = factor(fg_set, levels = "Upper_vs_Lower"),
    bg_set   = factor(bg_set, levels = "bg_UL"),
    sig      = add_sig_stars(FDR),
    log2OR_raw = log2OR,
    log2OR = ifelse(is.infinite(log2OR) & log2OR < 0, -3.5, log2OR),
    log2OR = ifelse(is.infinite(log2OR) & log2OR > 0,  3.5, log2OR),
    label_x  = ifelse(log2OR >= 0, log2OR + 0.12, log2OR - 0.12),
    hjust_lab = ifelse(log2OR >= 0, 0, 1)
  )

p_UL_chromhmm_enr <- ggplot(
  enr_UL_plot,
  aes(y = category, x = log2OR, fill = log2OR)
) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
             color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.10, 0.10))) +
  geom_text(aes(x = label_x, label = sig, hjust = hjust_lab),
            size = 5, color = "grey10") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2166AC",
    mid = "grey95",
    high = "#B2182B",
    midpoint = 0,
    name = expression(log[2]~OR)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Upper vs Lower Extremity DMRs\nDominant ChromHMM class enrichment",
    x = "log2(Odds ratio) (0 = no enrichment)",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_publish(base_size = 14, base_linewidth = 0.7) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

p_UL_chromhmm_enr
ggsave("UL_dmrs_chromhmm_class_enrichment_RA_OA_tracks_only.pdf",
       p_UL_chromhmm_enr, width = 6.7, height = 4.5)

# ===========================================================
# UL: Visualize Dominant Class Distribution Across Tracks
# ===========================================================

# use your existing class/track order
class_levels <- c("Promoter/TSS","Enhancer","Transcription",
                  "CTCF/Repressed","Polycomb/Repressed","Quiescent/Other")
track_levels <- c("Healthy_knee","RA_knee","RA_shoulder","RA_hand",
                  "OA_knee","OA_shoulder","OA_thumb")

dist_UL_tbl <- assign_UL_fg %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(dom_class)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    dom_class = factor(dom_class, levels = class_levels),
    track     = factor(track, levels = track_levels)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::count(track, dom_class, name = "n") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(track) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(frac = n / sum(n)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

p_UL_domclass_bytrack <- ggplot(dist_UL_tbl, aes(x = track, y = frac, fill = dom_class)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.85) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "plasma", end = 0.9, name = "Dominant class", direction = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Upper vs lower extremity DMRs\nDominant ChromHMM class per track",
    x = NULL, y = "Fraction of UL DMRs"
  ) +
  theme_publish(base_size = 13, base_linewidth = 0.6) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

p_UL_domclass_bytrack
ggsave("UL_dmrs_domclass_bytrack.pdf", p_UL_domclass_bytrack, width = 7, height = 4.5)


```

###ChromHMM "class-switch"

```{r}

### ChromHMM "class-switch": consensus vs knee-only

# ----------------------------
# helpers
# ----------------------------
mode1 <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  names(sort(table(x), decreasing = TRUE))[1]
}

# Consistent class order + colors (same as your other figures)
class_levels <- c(
  "Promoter/TSS","Enhancer","Transcription",
  "CTCF/Repressed","Polycomb/Repressed","Quiescent/Other"
)

class_cols <- viridis(length(class_levels), option = "plasma", end = 0.9, direction = 1)
names(class_cols) <- class_levels


# ----------------------------
# 1) Build wide switch table + consensus and knee-only calls
# ----------------------------
build_switch_table2 <- function(assign_df,
                                healthy_track = "Healthy_knee",
                                ra_tracks = c("RA_knee","RA_hand","RA_shoulder"),
                                oa_tracks = c("OA_knee","OA_thumb","OA_shoulder"),
                                ra_knee_track = "RA_knee",
                                oa_knee_track = "OA_knee",
                                min_cover = 0) {
  
  wide <- assign_df %>%
    mutate(
      track = str_trim(as.character(track)),
      dom_class = as.character(dom_class)
    ) %>%
    filter(is.na(frac_covered) | frac_covered >= min_cover) %>%
    select(dmr_id, track, dom_class) %>%
    distinct() %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = track, values_from = dom_class)
  
  # Ensure required columns exist even if missing in pivot_wider
  need_cols <- unique(c(healthy_track, ra_tracks, oa_tracks, ra_knee_track, oa_knee_track))
  missing_cols <- setdiff(need_cols, colnames(wide))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) for (cc in missing_cols) wide[[cc]] <- NA_character_
  
  out <- wide %>%
    mutate(
      Healthy = !!sym(healthy_track),
      
      # consensus across tracks
      RA_consensus = apply(select(., all_of(ra_tracks)), 1, mode1),
      OA_consensus = apply(select(., all_of(oa_tracks)), 1, mode1),
      
      # knee-only calls
      RA_knee_only = !!sym(ra_knee_track),
      OA_knee_only = !!sym(oa_knee_track)
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      # basic flags you already used (consensus-based)
      RA_diff_from_OA = !is.na(RA_consensus) & !is.na(OA_consensus) & RA_consensus != OA_consensus,
      RA_diff_from_Healthy = !is.na(Healthy) & !is.na(RA_consensus) & Healthy != RA_consensus,
      OA_diff_from_Healthy = !is.na(Healthy) & !is.na(OA_consensus) & Healthy != OA_consensus
    )
  
  out
}

# ----------------------------
# 2) Summarize switches (counts + switched fraction)
# ----------------------------
summarize_switches <- function(sw_df,
                               from_col = "Healthy",
                               to_col   = "RA_consensus",
                               class_levels_in = class_levels) {
  
  stopifnot(from_col %in% colnames(sw_df), to_col %in% colnames(sw_df))
  
  counts <- sw_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[from_col]]), !is.na(.data[[to_col]])) %>%
    count(.data[[from_col]], .data[[to_col]], name = "n") %>%
    rename(From = 1, To = 2) %>%
    mutate(
      From = factor(From, levels = class_levels_in),
      To   = factor(To,   levels = class_levels_in)
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(n))
  
  total_n <- sum(counts$n)
  stable_n <- counts %>%
    filter(From == To) %>%
    summarise(n = sum(n), .groups="drop") %>%
    pull(n)
  
  if (length(stable_n) == 0 || is.na(stable_n)) stable_n <- 0L
  switched_n <- total_n - stable_n
  
  list(
    counts = counts,
    total_n = total_n,
    stable_n = stable_n,
    switched_n = switched_n,
    stable_frac = ifelse(total_n > 0, stable_n / total_n, NA_real_),
    switched_frac = ifelse(total_n > 0, switched_n / total_n, NA_real_)
  )
}

# ----------------------------
# 3) Plot alluvial (topN changed switches)
# ----------------------------
plot_switch_alluvial <- function(counts_df,
                                 title,
                                 subtitle_stats = NULL,
                                 topN = 5,
                                 changed_only = TRUE,
                                 class_cols_in = class_cols) {
  
  df <- counts_df
  if (changed_only) df <- df %>% filter(From != To)
  
  df_top <- df %>%
    arrange(desc(n)) %>%
    slice_head(n = topN)
  
  ggplot(df_top, aes(axis1 = From, axis2 = To, y = n)) +
    ggalluvial::geom_alluvium(aes(fill = To), alpha = 0.9, width = 1/12) +
    ggalluvial::geom_stratum(width = 1/10, color = "grey30") +
    geom_text(stat = "stratum", aes(label = after_stat(stratum)), size = 3.4) +
    scale_x_discrete(limits = c("Healthy_knee", "Disease"), expand = c(.05, .05)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = class_cols_in, drop = FALSE, name = "Dominant class") +
    labs(
      x = NULL, y = "Number of DMRs",
      title = title,
      subtitle = subtitle_stats
    ) +
    theme_publish(base_size = 13, base_linewidth = 0.6) +
    theme(legend.position = "right")
}

# ----------------------------
# 4) Wrapper: build both consensus + knee-only switch results for a set
# ----------------------------
run_switch_pair <- function(sw_df, disease = c("RA","OA"), topN = 5, changed_only = TRUE) {
  disease <- match.arg(disease)
  
  if (disease == "RA") {
    # consensus
    s_cons <- summarize_switches(sw_df, from_col="Healthy", to_col="RA_consensus")
    sub_cons <- sprintf(
      "Consensus. Switched: %d/%d (%.1f%%); Stable: %d/%d (%.1f%%).",
      s_cons$switched_n, s_cons$total_n, 100*s_cons$switched_frac,
      s_cons$stable_n, s_cons$total_n, 100*s_cons$stable_frac
    )
    
    p_cons <- plot_switch_alluvial(
      s_cons$counts,
      title = "Healthy → RA consensus",
      subtitle_stats = sub_cons,
      topN = topN,
      changed_only = changed_only
    )
    
    # knee-only
    s_knee <- summarize_switches(sw_df, from_col="Healthy", to_col="RA_knee_only")
    sub_knee <- sprintf(
      "Knee-only. Switched: %d/%d (%.1f%%); Stable: %d/%d (%.1f%%).",
      s_knee$switched_n, s_knee$total_n, 100*s_knee$switched_frac,
      s_knee$stable_n, s_knee$total_n, 100*s_knee$stable_frac
    )
    
    p_knee <- plot_switch_alluvial(
      s_knee$counts,
      title = "Healthy → RA knee",
      subtitle_stats = sub_knee,
      topN = topN,
      changed_only = changed_only
    )
    
  } else {
    # consensus
    s_cons <- summarize_switches(sw_df, from_col="Healthy", to_col="OA_consensus")
    sub_cons <- sprintf(
      "Consensus. Switched: %d/%d (%.1f%%); Stable: %d/%d (%.1f%%).",
      s_cons$switched_n, s_cons$total_n, 100*s_cons$switched_frac,
      s_cons$stable_n, s_cons$total_n, 100*s_cons$stable_frac
    )
    
    p_cons <- plot_switch_alluvial(
      s_cons$counts,
      title = "Healthy → OA consensus",
      subtitle_stats = sub_cons,
      topN = topN,
      changed_only = changed_only
    )
    
    # knee-only
    s_knee <- summarize_switches(sw_df, from_col="Healthy", to_col="OA_knee_only")
    sub_knee <- sprintf(
      "Knee-only. Switched: %d/%d (%.1f%%); Stable: %d/%d (%.1f%%).",
      s_knee$switched_n, s_knee$total_n, 100*s_knee$switched_frac,
      s_knee$stable_n, s_knee$total_n, 100*s_knee$stable_frac
    )
    
    p_knee <- plot_switch_alluvial(
      s_knee$counts,
      title = "Healthy → OA knee",
      subtitle_stats = sub_knee,
      topN = topN,
      changed_only = changed_only
    )
  }
  
  list(
    consensus = list(summary = s_cons, plot = p_cons),
    knee      = list(summary = s_knee, plot = p_knee)
  )
}

# ----------------------------
# 5) Build switch tables for each DMR set
# ----------------------------
sw_list <- list(
  Shared_hyper  = build_switch_table2(assign_shared_hyper),
  Shared_hypo   = build_switch_table2(assign_shared_hypo),
  RA_only_hyper = build_switch_table2(assign_raonly_hyper),
  RA_only_hypo  = build_switch_table2(assign_raonly_hypo),
  OA_only_hyper = build_switch_table2(assign_oaonly_hyper),
  OA_only_hypo  = build_switch_table2(assign_oaonly_hypo)
)

topN <- 5
changed_only <- TRUE

plot_list <- list()
summary_tbl <- list()

for (nm in names(sw_list)) {
  
  sw <- sw_list[[nm]]
  
  if (grepl("^RA_only", nm)) {
    rr <- run_switch_pair(sw, disease="RA", topN=topN, changed_only=changed_only)
    
    plot_list[[paste0(nm, "_consensus")]] <- rr$consensus$plot
    plot_list[[paste0(nm, "_knee")]]      <- rr$knee$plot
    
    summary_tbl[[nm]] <- tibble(
      set = nm,
      disease = "RA",
      switched_consensus = rr$consensus$summary$switched_n,
      total_consensus    = rr$consensus$summary$total_n,
      switched_frac_consensus = rr$consensus$summary$switched_frac,
      switched_knee = rr$knee$summary$switched_n,
      total_knee    = rr$knee$summary$total_n,
      switched_frac_knee = rr$knee$summary$switched_frac
    )
    
  } else if (grepl("^OA_only", nm)) {
    rr <- run_switch_pair(sw, disease="OA", topN=topN, changed_only=changed_only)
    
    plot_list[[paste0(nm, "_consensus")]] <- rr$consensus$plot
    plot_list[[paste0(nm, "_knee")]]      <- rr$knee$plot
    
    summary_tbl[[nm]] <- tibble(
      set = nm,
      disease = "OA",
      switched_consensus = rr$consensus$summary$switched_n,
      total_consensus    = rr$consensus$summary$total_n,
      switched_frac_consensus = rr$consensus$summary$switched_frac,
      switched_knee = rr$knee$summary$switched_n,
      total_knee    = rr$knee$summary$total_n,
      switched_frac_knee = rr$knee$summary$switched_frac
    )
    
  } else if (grepl("^Shared", nm)) {
    # For shared sets, do BOTH RA and OA comparisons (each with consensus + knee-only)
    rr_ra <- run_switch_pair(sw, disease="RA", topN=topN, changed_only=changed_only)
    rr_oa <- run_switch_pair(sw, disease="OA", topN=topN, changed_only=changed_only)
    
    plot_list[[paste0(nm, "_RA_consensus")]] <- rr_ra$consensus$plot
    plot_list[[paste0(nm, "_RA_knee")]]      <- rr_ra$knee$plot
    plot_list[[paste0(nm, "_OA_consensus")]] <- rr_oa$consensus$plot
    plot_list[[paste0(nm, "_OA_knee")]]      <- rr_oa$knee$plot
    
    summary_tbl[[paste0(nm, "_RA")]] <- tibble(
      set = paste0(nm, "_RA"),
      disease = "RA",
      switched_consensus = rr_ra$consensus$summary$switched_n,
      total_consensus    = rr_ra$consensus$summary$total_n,
      switched_frac_consensus = rr_ra$consensus$summary$switched_frac,
      switched_knee = rr_ra$knee$summary$switched_n,
      total_knee    = rr_ra$knee$summary$total_n,
      switched_frac_knee = rr_ra$knee$summary$switched_frac
    )
    
    summary_tbl[[paste0(nm, "_OA")]] <- tibble(
      set = paste0(nm, "_OA"),
      disease = "OA",
      switched_consensus = rr_oa$consensus$summary$switched_n,
      total_consensus    = rr_oa$consensus$summary$total_n,
      switched_frac_consensus = rr_oa$consensus$summary$switched_frac,
      switched_knee = rr_oa$knee$summary$switched_n,
      total_knee    = rr_oa$knee$summary$total_n,
      switched_frac_knee = rr_oa$consensus$summary$switched_frac  # <-- careful (see below)
    )
    
    # NOTE:
    # if you want OA_knee_only specifically, keep rr_oa$knee (I wrote it above properly).
    # I’m leaving this comment because you may accidentally re-use consensus here.
    summary_tbl[[paste0(nm, "_OA")]]$switched_frac_knee <- rr_oa$knee$summary$switched_frac
    summary_tbl[[paste0(nm, "_OA")]]$switched_knee      <- rr_oa$knee$summary$switched_n
    summary_tbl[[paste0(nm, "_OA")]]$total_knee         <- rr_oa$knee$summary$total_n
  }
}

# ----------------------------
# 5b) Build switch tables for background universes (from the previous code chunk)
# ----------------------------
sw_bg <- list(
  bg_RA     = build_switch_table2(assign_bg_RA),
  bg_OA     = build_switch_table2(assign_bg_OA),
  bg_shared = build_switch_table2(assign_bg_shared)
)

# ----------------------------
# 5c) Fisher enrichment: switched vs stable (foreground vs background)
# ----------------------------
fisher_switch_enrichment <- function(sw_fg, sw_bg, to_col = "RA_consensus") {
  # keep only rows with both Healthy and the disease call
  fg <- sw_fg %>% filter(!is.na(Healthy), !is.na(.data[[to_col]]))
  bg <- sw_bg %>% filter(!is.na(Healthy), !is.na(.data[[to_col]]))

  fg_sw <- sum(fg$Healthy != fg[[to_col]])
  fg_st <- nrow(fg) - fg_sw

  bg_sw <- sum(bg$Healthy != bg[[to_col]])
  bg_st <- nrow(bg) - bg_sw

  ft <- fisher.test(matrix(c(fg_sw, fg_st, bg_sw, bg_st), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE))

  tibble(
    fg_n = nrow(fg),
    fg_switched = fg_sw,
    fg_frac = fg_sw / nrow(fg),
    bg_n = nrow(bg),
    bg_switched = bg_sw,
    bg_frac = bg_sw / nrow(bg),
    OR = unname(ft$estimate),
    p = ft$p.value
  )
}

# ----------------------------
# 5d) Run Fisher switch-enrichment (consensus-based)
# ----------------------------
enr_switch_tbl <- bind_rows(
  # RA-only sets vs RA background (use RA_consensus)
  fisher_switch_enrichment(sw_list$RA_only_hyper, sw_bg$bg_RA, to_col = "RA_consensus") %>%
    mutate(set = "RA_only_hyper", disease = "RA", bg = "bg_RA"),
  fisher_switch_enrichment(sw_list$RA_only_hypo,  sw_bg$bg_RA, to_col = "RA_consensus") %>%
    mutate(set = "RA_only_hypo",  disease = "RA", bg = "bg_RA"),

  # OA-only sets vs OA background (use OA_consensus)
  fisher_switch_enrichment(sw_list$OA_only_hyper, sw_bg$bg_OA, to_col = "OA_consensus") %>%
    mutate(set = "OA_only_hyper", disease = "OA", bg = "bg_OA"),
  fisher_switch_enrichment(sw_list$OA_only_hypo,  sw_bg$bg_OA, to_col = "OA_consensus") %>%
    mutate(set = "OA_only_hypo",  disease = "OA", bg = "bg_OA"),

  # Shared sets: you can test vs shared background using RA_consensus or OA_consensus
  fisher_switch_enrichment(sw_list$Shared_hyper,  sw_bg$bg_shared, to_col = "RA_consensus") %>%
    mutate(set = "Shared_hyper",  disease = "RA", bg = "bg_shared"),
  fisher_switch_enrichment(sw_list$Shared_hypo,   sw_bg$bg_shared, to_col = "RA_consensus") %>%
    mutate(set = "Shared_hypo",   disease = "RA", bg = "bg_shared"),

  fisher_switch_enrichment(sw_list$Shared_hyper,  sw_bg$bg_shared, to_col = "OA_consensus") %>%
    mutate(set = "Shared_hyper",  disease = "OA", bg = "bg_shared"),
  fisher_switch_enrichment(sw_list$Shared_hypo,   sw_bg$bg_shared, to_col = "OA_consensus") %>%
    mutate(set = "Shared_hypo",   disease = "OA", bg = "bg_shared")
) %>%
  mutate(
    FDR = p.adjust(p, "BH"),
    log2OR = log2(OR)
  ) %>%
  arrange(FDR)

enr_switch_tbl

# ----------------------------
# 6) View plots (paired consensus vs knee-only)
# ----------------------------
wrap_plots(plot_list, ncol = 4)

# ----------------------------
# 7) Compare switched fractions (consensus vs knee-only)
# ----------------------------
switch_compare_tbl <- bind_rows(summary_tbl) %>%
  mutate(
    delta = switched_frac_consensus - switched_frac_knee,
    switched_consensus_str = sprintf("%d/%d (%.1f%%)", switched_consensus, total_consensus, 100*switched_frac_consensus),
    switched_knee_str      = sprintf("%d/%d (%.1f%%)", switched_knee, total_knee, 100*switched_frac_knee),
    delta_pct = 100*delta
  ) %>%
  select(set, disease, switched_consensus_str, switched_knee_str, delta_pct) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(delta_pct)))

switch_compare_tbl
write_csv(switch_compare_tbl, "supplementary_table_3.csv")

# ----------------------------
# 8) Show only selected alluvial heatmaps
# ----------------------------

plot_switch_topN <- function(sw_df,
                             to_col = "RA_consensus",
                             title = "",
                             topN = 5,
                             changed_only = TRUE,
                             class_levels,
                             class_cols,
                             extra_subtitle = NULL) {

  counts <- sw_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(Healthy), !is.na(.data[[to_col]])) %>%
    count(From = Healthy, To = .data[[to_col]], name = "n") %>%
    mutate(
      From = factor(From, levels = class_levels),
      To   = factor(To,   levels = class_levels)
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(n))

  total_n <- sum(counts$n)
  stable_n <- counts %>% filter(From == To) %>% summarise(n = sum(n)) %>% pull(n)
  stable_n <- ifelse(length(stable_n)==0 || is.na(stable_n), 0L, stable_n)
  switched_n <- total_n - stable_n

  df_plot <- counts
  if (changed_only) df_plot <- df_plot %>% filter(From != To)
  df_plot <- df_plot %>% slice_head(n = topN)
  
  base_sub <- paste0(
    "Top ", topN, " switches shown. Switched: ",
    switched_n, "/", total_n, " (", round(100*switched_n/total_n,1),
    "%); Stable: ", stable_n, "/", total_n, " (", round(100*stable_n/total_n,1), "%)."
  )

  sub <- if (!is.null(extra_subtitle)) paste0(base_sub, "\n", extra_subtitle) else base_sub

  p <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(axis1 = From, axis2 = To, y = n)) +
    ggalluvial::geom_alluvium(aes(fill = To), alpha = 0.9, width = 1/12) +
    ggalluvial::geom_stratum(width = 1/10, color = "grey30") +
      geom_label(
    stat = "stratum",
    aes(label = after_stat(stratum)),
    fill = "grey95",
    color ="black",
    label.size = 0.2
    )+
    scale_x_discrete(limits = c("NIC (healthy knee)", "RA consensus"), expand = c(.12, .12)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = class_cols, name = "Dominant class") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Number of DMRs", title = title, subtitle = sub) +
    theme_publish(base_size = 13, base_linewidth = 0.6) +
    theme(legend.position = "none") 
    

  list(plot = p, counts = counts, total_n = total_n, stable_n = stable_n, switched_n = switched_n)
}

# Colors consistent with other plots
class_levels <- c("Promoter/TSS","Enhancer","Transcription","CTCF/Repressed","Polycomb/Repressed","Quiescent/Other")
class_cols <- viridis::viridis(length(class_levels), option = "plasma", end = 0.9, direction = 1)
names(class_cols) <- class_levels

#helper for subtitles
mk_extra <- function(set, disease) {
  r <- enr_switch_tbl %>% filter(set == !!set, disease == !!disease) %>% slice(1)
  sprintf("Switch enrichment: OR=%.2f, FDR=%.2g (%.1f%% vs %.1f%%)",
          r$OR, r$FDR, 100*r$fg_frac, 100*r$bg_frac)
}
# Build the four panels

p_ra_only_hyper <- plot_switch_topN(sw_list$RA_only_hyper, "RA_consensus",
  title = "RA-only hyper: NIC -> RA consensus", topN = 5, changed_only = TRUE,
  class_levels = class_levels, class_cols = class_cols,
  extra_subtitle = mk_extra("RA_only_hyper","RA")
)$plot

p_ra_only_hypo <- plot_switch_topN(sw_list$RA_only_hypo, "RA_consensus",
  title = "RA-only hypo: NIC -> RA consensus", topN = 5, changed_only = TRUE,
  class_levels = class_levels, class_cols = class_cols,
  extra_subtitle = mk_extra("RA_only_hypo","RA")
)$plot

p_shared_hyper_ra <- plot_switch_topN(sw_list$Shared_hyper, "RA_consensus",
  title = "Shared hyper: NIC -> RA consensus", topN = 5, changed_only = TRUE,
  class_levels = class_levels, class_cols = class_cols,
  extra_subtitle = mk_extra("Shared_hyper","RA")
)$plot

p_shared_hypo_ra <- plot_switch_topN(sw_list$Shared_hypo, "RA_consensus",
  title = "Shared hypo: NIC -> RA consensus", topN = 5, changed_only = TRUE,
  class_levels = class_levels, class_cols = class_cols,
  extra_subtitle = mk_extra("Shared_hypo","RA")
)$plot

p_fig2c <- patchwork::wrap_plots(
  p_shared_hyper_ra, p_shared_hypo_ra, p_ra_only_hyper, p_ra_only_hypo,
  ncol = 2
)

p_fig2c

ggsave(filename = "alluvial_heatmaps.pdf",
         plot = p_fig2c, width = 11.2, height = 7)

# ----------------------------
# 9) Show the 5 categories of switch-types in each group
# ----------------------------

# ----------------------------
# Pattern table 
# ----------------------------
pattern5_tbl <- function(sw_df, set_name, direction) {
  sw_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(Healthy), !is.na(RA_consensus), !is.na(OA_consensus)) %>%
    mutate(
      RA_switched = Healthy != RA_consensus,
      OA_switched = Healthy != OA_consensus,
      both_switched = RA_switched & OA_switched,
      same_dest = both_switched & (RA_consensus == OA_consensus),
      pattern = case_when(
        !RA_switched & !OA_switched ~ "Stable in both",
        RA_switched & !OA_switched  ~ "RA-only switch",
        !RA_switched & OA_switched  ~ "OA-only switch",
        both_switched & same_dest   ~ "Both switch (same dest)",
        both_switched & !same_dest  ~ "Both switch (different dest)"
      )
    ) %>%
    count(pattern, name = "n") %>%
    mutate(
      frac = n / sum(n),
      set = set_name,
      direction = direction
    )
}

pat_levels <- c(
  "Stable in both",
  "RA-only switch",
  "OA-only switch",
  "Both switch (same dest)",
  "Both switch (different dest)"
)

# ----------------------------
# Fisher enrichment against SHARED
# ----------------------------
pattern_calls <- function(sw_df) {
  sw_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(Healthy), !is.na(RA_consensus), !is.na(OA_consensus)) %>%
    transmute(
      RA_switched = Healthy != RA_consensus,
      OA_switched = Healthy != OA_consensus,
      both_switched = RA_switched & OA_switched,
      same_dest = both_switched & (RA_consensus == OA_consensus),
      pattern = case_when(
        !RA_switched & !OA_switched ~ "Stable in both",
        RA_switched & !OA_switched  ~ "RA-only switch",
        !RA_switched & OA_switched  ~ "OA-only switch",
        both_switched & same_dest   ~ "Both switch (same dest)",
        both_switched & !same_dest  ~ "Both switch (different dest)"
      )
    )
}

fisher_pattern_vs_shared <- function(fg_sw, bg_sw, pattern_of_interest,
                                     fg_name, direction, disease_tag) {
  fg <- pattern_calls(fg_sw)
  bg <- pattern_calls(bg_sw)

  fg_in <- sum(fg$pattern == pattern_of_interest)
  fg_out <- nrow(fg) - fg_in
  bg_in <- sum(bg$pattern == pattern_of_interest)
  bg_out <- nrow(bg) - bg_in

  ft <- fisher.test(matrix(c(fg_in, fg_out, bg_in, bg_out), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE))

  tibble::tibble(
    set = fg_name,
    direction = direction,
    disease = disease_tag,
    pattern = pattern_of_interest,
    fg_n = nrow(fg),
    fg_in = fg_in,
    fg_frac = fg_in / nrow(fg),
    bg_n = nrow(bg),
    bg_in = bg_in,
    bg_frac = bg_in / nrow(bg),
    OR = unname(ft$estimate),
    p = ft$p.value
  )
}

#   RA-only vs Shared on "RA-only switch"
#   OA-only vs Shared on "OA-only switch"
enr_pat_tbl <- bind_rows(
  fisher_pattern_vs_shared(sw_list$RA_only_hyper, sw_list$Shared_hyper,
                           pattern_of_interest = "RA-only switch",
                           fg_name = "RA_only_hyper", direction = "Hyper", disease_tag = "RA"),
  fisher_pattern_vs_shared(sw_list$RA_only_hypo,  sw_list$Shared_hypo,
                           pattern_of_interest = "RA-only switch",
                           fg_name = "RA_only_hypo",  direction = "Hypo",  disease_tag = "RA"),
  fisher_pattern_vs_shared(sw_list$OA_only_hyper, sw_list$Shared_hyper,
                           pattern_of_interest = "OA-only switch",
                           fg_name = "OA_only_hyper", direction = "Hyper", disease_tag = "OA"),
  fisher_pattern_vs_shared(sw_list$OA_only_hypo,  sw_list$Shared_hypo,
                           pattern_of_interest = "OA-only switch",
                           fg_name = "OA_only_hypo",  direction = "Hypo",  disease_tag = "OA")
) %>%
  mutate(FDR = p.adjust(p, "BH"),
         log2OR = log2(OR))

# ----------------------------
# Subtitle builder uses enr_pat_tbl
# ----------------------------
make_enr_subtitle2 <- function(enr_tbl, hyper_set, hypo_set, disease_tag) {
  eH <- enr_tbl %>% filter(set == hyper_set, disease == disease_tag)
  eL <- enr_tbl %>% filter(set == hypo_set,  disease == disease_tag)

  fmt <- function(df, lab) {
    if (nrow(df) == 0) return(paste0(lab, ": NA"))
    sprintf("%s vs Shared: OR=%.2f, FDR=%.2g", lab, df$OR[1], df$FDR[1])
  }

  paste0(fmt(eH, "Hyper"), "\n", fmt(eL, "Hypo"))
}

# ============================================================
# A) Shared
# ============================================================
shared_pat_tbl <- bind_rows(
  pattern5_tbl(sw_list$Shared_hyper, "Shared", "Hyper"),
  pattern5_tbl(sw_list$Shared_hypo,  "Shared", "Hypo")
) %>%
  mutate(
    pattern   = factor(pattern, levels = pat_levels),
    direction = factor(direction, levels = c("Hyper", "Hypo"))
  )

pA_shared <- ggplot(shared_pat_tbl, aes(x = direction, y = frac, fill = pattern)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.72) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(round(100 * frac), "%")),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    size = 4, color = "white"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1), limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "mako", begin = 0.15, end = 0.8, direction = -1, name = NULL) +
  labs(
    title = "Shared DMRs",
    subtitle = "Chromatin-switch patterns\nrelative to NIC",
    x = NULL, y = "Fraction of DMRs"
  ) +
  theme_publish(base_size = 13, base_linewidth = 0.6) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# ============================================================
# B) RA-only (same style as A) + enrichment subtitle
# ============================================================
ra_pat_tbl <- bind_rows(
  pattern5_tbl(sw_list$RA_only_hyper, "RA-only", "Hyper"),
  pattern5_tbl(sw_list$RA_only_hypo,  "RA-only", "Hypo")
) %>%
  mutate(
    pattern   = factor(pattern, levels = pat_levels),
    direction = factor(direction, levels = c("Hyper", "Hypo"))
  )

sub_B <- make_enr_subtitle2(enr_pat_tbl,
                            hyper_set = "RA_only_hyper",
                            hypo_set  = "RA_only_hypo",
                            disease_tag = "RA")

pB_ra <- ggplot(ra_pat_tbl, aes(x = direction, y = frac, fill = pattern)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.72) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(100 * frac), "%")),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
```
