```{r}
            size = 4, color = "white") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1), limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "mako", begin = 0.15, end = 0.8, direction = -1, name = NULL) +
  labs(
    title = "RA-only DMRs",
    subtitle = sub_B,
    x = NULL, y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_publish(base_size = 13, base_linewidth = 0.6) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# ============================================================
# C) OA-only (same style as A) + enrichment subtitle
# ============================================================

oa_pat_tbl <- bind_rows(
  pattern5_tbl(sw_list$OA_only_hyper, "OA-only", "Hyper"),
  pattern5_tbl(sw_list$OA_only_hypo,  "OA-only", "Hypo")
) %>%
  mutate(
    pattern   = factor(pattern, levels = pat_levels),
    direction = factor(direction, levels = c("Hyper", "Hypo"))
  )

sub_C <- make_enr_subtitle2(enr_pat_tbl,
                            hyper_set = "OA_only_hyper",
                            hypo_set  = "OA_only_hypo",
                            disease_tag = "OA")

pC_oa <- ggplot(oa_pat_tbl, aes(x = direction, y = frac, fill = pattern)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.72) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(100 * frac), "%")),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            size = 4, color = "white") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1), limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "mako", begin = 0.15, end = 0.8, direction = -1, name = NULL) +
  labs(
    title = "OA-only DMRs",
    subtitle = sub_C,
    x = NULL, y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_publish(base_size = 13, base_linewidth = 0.6) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# ============================================================
# Combine side-by-side (A | B | C)
# ============================================================
p_fig2d <- pA_shared | pB_ra | pC_oa
p_fig2d

ggsave("fig2d_A_B_C_side_by_side.pdf", p_fig2d, width = 8, height = 6)


```



# ----- To be deleted after this------
##DMR lollipop plot
These are only promoter regions
abs(betavaluechange) > 0.1 pval <0.05

```{r}
#do lollipop plots using hyper or hypo methylated regions for only promoter regions
#(top30 regions by mean deltaB difference)

#single-condition lollipop plot (e.g. RA vs Healthy knee)
dmr_plot_single <- function(dmr_df, string1, string2, hyper_or_hypo){
  
  #filter promoters with effect size
  dmr_plot_filtered <- dmr_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(annot.symbol) & abs(meandiff) > 0.1 & annot.type == "Promoter")
  
  if (hyper_or_hypo == "hyper"){
    dmr_plot_filtered <- dmr_plot_filtered %>%
      filter(meandiff > 0) %>%
      arrange(desc(meandiff)) %>%
      head(n = 30) 
  } else if (hyper_or_hypo == "all"){
    dmr_plot_filtered <- dmr_plot_filtered %>%
      arrange(desc(meandiff)) 
  } else {
    dmr_plot_filtered <- dmr_plot_filtered %>%
      filter(meandiff < 0) %>%
      arrange(meandiff) %>%
      head(n = 30) 
  }
  
  #unique gene labels
  dmr_plot_filtered$gene_label <- make.unique(as.character(dmr_plot_filtered$annot.symbol), sep="--")
  dmr_plot_filtered$gene_label <- factor(
    dmr_plot_filtered$gene_label,
    levels = dmr_plot_filtered$gene_label[order(-dmr_plot_filtered$meandiff)]
  )
  #title
  title <- paste0(string1, " ", string2, " - ", hyper_or_hypo)
  
  if (grepl("RA",string1)){
    color_point <- "#A888B5"
  }else {
    color_point <- "#C5D3E8"
  }
  
  #plot
  p <- ggplot(dmr_plot_filtered,
              aes(x = meandiff,
                  y = gene_label,
                  size = no.cpgs)) +
    geom_point(color = color_point, alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    scale_size_continuous(name = "Number of CpGs",
                          range = c(3,6), breaks = c(5,15)) +
    labs(title = title, x = "Delta Beta", y = "Genes") +
    theme_publish(base_size = 14, base_linewidth = 0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey90"),
          plot.title = element_text(size=14)) +
    guides(size = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = color_point))) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,by=0.1),
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1)))
  
  ggsave(filename = paste0(string1, "_", string2, "-", hyper_or_hypo, ".png"),
         plot = p, width = 8, height = 6.5, bg = "transparent")
  ggsave(filename = paste0(string1, "_", string2, "-", hyper_or_hypo, ".pdf"),
         plot = p, width = 8, height = 6.5)

}

# Example usage:
# dmr_plot_single(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_df, "RA Knee", "vs Healthy Knee", "all")
# dmr_plot_single(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_df, "RA Knee", "vs Healthy Knee", "hyper")
# dmr_plot_single(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_df, "RA Knee", "vs Healthy Knee", "hypo")
# dmr_plot_single(dmr_oa_and_healthy_knee_df, "OA Knee", "vs Healthy Knee", "all")
# dmr_plot_single(dmr_oa_and_healthy_knee_df, "OA Knee", "vs Healthy Knee", "hyper")
# dmr_plot_single(dmr_oa_and_healthy_knee_df, "OA Knee", "vs Healthy Knee", "hypo")
# dmr_plot_single(dmr_oa_vs_ra_knee_df, "RA Knee", "vs OA Knee", "all")
# dmr_plot_single(dmr_oa_vs_ra_knee_df, "RA Knee", "vs OA Knee", "hyper")
# dmr_plot_single(dmr_oa_vs_ra_knee_df, "RA Knee", "vs OA Knee", "hypo")

```

###DMR ORA and further

```{r}

# ------ Promoter region genes --------- #

#look at the promoter region genes and do pre-filtering according to deltab 
#define universe genes
universe_genes <- unique(annotation_file_filtered$genesUniq)
universe_genes <- universe_genes[universe_genes != ""]

#convert them to entrez IDs
universe_entrez <- bitr(universe_genes,
                            fromType = "SYMBOL",
                            toType = "ENTREZID",
                            OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db)

do_ora <- function(dmrs_of_interest){
  
  #do filtering
  dmrs_of_interest <- dmrs_of_interest %>%
    filter(!is.na(annot.symbol) & abs(meandiff) > 0.1 & annot.type == "Promoter")
  
  #define the genes of interest (from dmps)
  genes_of_interest <- unique(dmrs_of_interest$annot.symbol)
  genes_of_interest <- genes_of_interest[genes_of_interest != ""]
  
  genes_of_interest_entrez <- bitr(genes_of_interest, 
                                   fromType = "SYMBOL",
                                   toType = "ENTREZID",
                                   OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db)

  reactome_res <- enrichPathway(
    gene = genes_of_interest_entrez$ENTREZID,
    universe = universe_entrez$ENTREZID,
    organism = "human",
    pvalueCutoff = 1,
    readable = TRUE)

  return(reactome_res@result)
}

ora_ra_vs_healthy_knee <- do_ora(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_df)
ora_oa_vs_healthy_knee <- do_ora(dmr_oa_and_healthy_knee_df)

# ------ Print them and further analysis in string-db  --------- #

# #print them for further analysis in string-db (promoter absmeandif > 0.1)
print_string <- function (dmrs_of_interest) {
  dmrs_of_interest <- dmrs_of_interest %>%
    filter(!is.na(annot.symbol) & abs(meandiff) > 0.1 & annot.type == "Promoter")
  genes_of_interest <- unique(dmrs_of_interest$annot.symbol)
  genes_of_interest <- genes_of_interest[!(genes_of_interest %in% c("",NA))]
  genes_string <- paste(genes_of_interest,collapse = '","')
  genes_string <- paste0('"', genes_string, '"')
  cat(genes_string)
  return(genes_string)
}

ra_dmr_genes_list <- print_string(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_df)
oa_dmr_genes_list <- print_string(dmr_oa_and_healthy_knee_df)

# ------ Check if they are expressed or not  --------- #

read_counts <- readRDS("~/Desktop/PhD/2024 Second Term/RNA-seq all/nrm_counts_be_removed_mean.RDS")

ra_dmr_genes <- eval(parse(text = paste0("c(", ra_dmr_genes_list, ")")))
oa_dmr_genes <- eval(parse(text = paste0("c(", oa_dmr_genes_list, ")")))

# > 5 counts in NS or TNF 
check_expressed_genes <- function(gene_list, read_counts) {
  read_counts %>%
    filter(genename %in% gene_list) %>%
    mutate(expressed = (NS > 5 | TNF > 5)) %>%
    filter(expressed) %>%
    select(genename)
}

# get expressed genes for each list
ra_expressed <- check_expressed_genes(ra_dmr_genes, read_counts)
oa_expressed <- check_expressed_genes(oa_dmr_genes, read_counts)

# see how many of them are expressed 
cat("RA expressed genes:", nrow(ra_expressed), "\n")
cat(paste(ra_expressed$genename, collapse = ", "))
cat("OA expressed genes:", nrow(oa_expressed), "\n")
cat(paste(oa_expressed$genename, collapse = ", "))


#plot it
genes_to_plot <- ra_dmr_genes

plot_df <- read_counts %>%
  filter(genename %in% genes_to_plot) %>%
  mutate(expressed = (NS > 5 | TNF > 5)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(NS, TNF), names_to = "Condition", values_to = "Expression") %>%
  mutate(
    Expression_capped = pmin(pmax(0,Expression), 20),  # cap at 20
    gene_label = ifelse(expressed, paste0("**", genename, "**"), genename)
  )
  

#plotting
source("custom_theme_ege.R")

p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Condition, y = reorder(genename, Expression_capped), fill = Expression_capped)) +
  geom_tile(color = "grey80") +  # adds light grid lines
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    option = "C",
    breaks = c(0, 5, 10, 20),
    limits = c(0, 20),
    name = "Expression"
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1.5, color = "white", size = 0.8) +  # line between NS and TNF
  labs(
    title = "Expression of DMR-associated genes OA",
    x = NULL, y = "Gene"
  ) +
  custom_theme_ege()


ggsave(filename = "ra_promoter_dmr_expression.png",
         plot = p, width = 4, height = 5, bg = "transparent")
ggsave(filename = "ra_promoter_dmr_expression.pdf",
         plot = p, width = 4, height = 5)

# ------ Check if they are expressed in different stimulation conditions  --------- #

stim_read_counts <- readRDS("~/Desktop/PhD/2024 First Term/RNA Sequencing from Tsuchiya et al./ra_expression_table.rds")

# > 5 counts in any of the conditions
check_expressed_genes_stim <- function(gene_list, read_counts) {
  read_counts %>%
    filter(genename %in% gene_list) %>%
    mutate(expressed = (NS > 10 | TNFa > 10 | IFNa > 10 | IFNg > 10 | IL17 > 10 | IL18 > 10 | IL1b > 10 | IL6 > 10 | TGFb > 10 | all > 10 )) %>%
    filter(expressed) %>%
    select(genename)
}

# get expressed genes for each list
ra_expressed_stim <- check_expressed_genes_stim(ra_dmr_genes, stim_read_counts)
oa_expressed_stim <- check_expressed_genes_stim(oa_dmr_genes, stim_read_counts)

# see how many of them are expressed 
cat("RA expressed genes:", nrow(ra_expressed_stim), "\n")
cat(paste(ra_expressed_stim$genename, collapse = ", "))
cat("OA expressed genes:", nrow(oa_expressed_stim), "\n")
cat(paste(oa_expressed_stim$genename, collapse = ", "))

# ---- build heatmap data frame for plotting ----
# choose which gene list to plot
genes_to_plot <- ra_expressed_stim

# columns of conditions present in your table (order them as you want)
cond_cols <- c("NS","TNFa","IFNa","IFNg","IL17","IL18","IL1b","IL6","TGFb","all")

plot_df <- stim_read_counts %>%
  filter(genename %in% genes_to_plot$genename) %>%
  select(genename, all_of(cond_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -genename, names_to = "Condition", values_to = "Expression") %>%
  # cap expression for color scale and remove extreme outliers
  mutate(#Expression_capped = pmin(Expression, 20), # cap at 20 
         Expression_log = log1p(Expression),#also put log1p 
         is_expressed = Expression > 5) #see if it is expressed or not

# order genes by mean expression across conditions (descending)
gene_levels <- plot_df %>%
  group_by(genename) %>%
  summarise(meanExpr = mean(Expression, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(meanExpr) %>%    # small -> top of plot
  pull(genename)

plot_df$genename <- factor(plot_df$genename, levels = gene_levels)
plot_df$Condition <- factor(plot_df$Condition, levels = cond_cols)  # keep condition order

cont_df <- plot_df %>% mutate(Expression_log = ifelse(is_expressed, Expression_log, NA_real_))

p <- ggplot(cont_df, aes(x = Condition, y = genename, fill = Expression_log)) +
  geom_tile(color = "grey80") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C", na.value = "white",
                       name = "log1p(Expression)",
                       guide = guide_colorbar(barwidth = 0.5, barheight = 8)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Gene", title = "Expression of Genes With Promoter DMRs") +
  custom_theme_ege() +
  theme(legend.position = "right",axis.text.x = element_text(face="bold", angle=45, hjust = 1))

ggsave(filename = "ra_promoter_dmr_expression_diff_stims.png",
         plot = p, width = 6, height = 5, bg = "transparent")
ggsave(filename = "ra_promoter_dmr_expression_diff_stims.pdf",
         plot = p, width = 6, height = 5)


# ------ Promoter DMRs and expressed in Fibroblasts  --------- #

dmr_promoter_expressed_ra <- dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_df %>% filter (annot.symbol %in% ra_expressed$genename & annot.type == "Promoter" & abs(meandiff) > 0.1) %>% mutate(disease_group = "RA")

dmr_promoter_expressed_oa <- dmr_oa_and_healthy_knee_df %>% filter (annot.symbol %in% oa_expressed$genename & annot.type == "Promoter" & abs(meandiff) > 0.1) %>% mutate(disease_group = "OA")

dmr_promoter_expressed_combined <- bind_rows(dmr_promoter_expressed_oa,dmr_promoter_expressed_ra)

#put them into categories
dmr_promoter_expressed_combined <- dmr_promoter_expressed_combined %>%
  mutate(category = case_when(
    annot.symbol %in% c("EBF3","HLX","HLX-AS1","PITX2","ZBTB18","MITF") ~ "Homeobox / Developmental TF",
    annot.symbol %in% c("PIWIL2","GAS5","LINC00944","MIR29B2CHG","VTRNA2-1") ~ "Noncoding / lncRNA",
    annot.symbol %in% c("CFB","BCL6","C1QTNF3","CLU","HYAL1","ITIH4","LYVE1","PDGFA","PLA2G2A","SERPINA3","TNFRSF1A","PMEPA1") ~ "Immune / Cytokine Regulation",
    annot.symbol %in% c("FGD4", "FGD5", "PRKCZ", "DUSP22", "GPR162", "MKNK1", "WWP2", "FGFR2", "ANKRD26", "MOB3C", "PMEPA1", "TRPV3","CREB5") ~ "Signaling / Receptor Pathways",
    annot.symbol %in% c("CTNNA1", "HOOK2", "UNC45A", "LRRTM2", "IQCE", "SSPN", "MFAP5") ~ "Cytoskeleton / Adhesion",
    annot.symbol %in% c("HSD17B14","PFKP","SLC26A4","LMBRD1","NNAT") ~ "Metabolism",
    annot.symbol %in% c("CSTB","SERPINA3") ~ "Protease Inhibitors",
    annot.symbol %in% c("SPATS2L") ~ "Post-transcriptional regulation",
    annot.symbol %in% c("BLCAP") ~ "Cell Cycle / Apoptosis",
    annot.symbol %in% c("WSCD1", "FAM43B","ZBTB37") ~ "Other / Poorly Characterized",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )) %>%
  distinct(annot.symbol, disease_group, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(gene_label = make.unique(as.character(annot.symbol), sep="--")) %>%
  arrange(desc(meandiff)) %>%
  mutate(gene_label = factor(gene_label, levels = gene_label[order(dmr_promoter_expressed_combined$meandiff)]))

#colors
disease_colors <- c(
  "OA" = "#C5D3E8",
  "RA" = "#A888B5"
)

p <- ggplot(dmr_promoter_expressed_combined,
            aes(x = meandiff,
                y = gene_label,
                size = no.cpgs,
                color = disease_group)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    scale_size_continuous(name = "Number of CpGs", range = c(3,6), breaks = c(5,15)) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Disease Specificity", values = disease_colors) +
    labs(title = "DMRs by Functional Category and Disease Specificity",
         x = "Delta Beta", y = "Genes") +
    facet_wrap(~category, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
    custom_theme_ege() +
    theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey90"),
          plot.title = element_text(size=14),
          legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines")) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=5))) + 
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,by=0.1),
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1)))

ggsave(filename = "dmrs_categorized_ra_and_oa.png",
         plot = p, width = 10, height = 12, bg = "transparent")
ggsave(filename = "dmrs_categorized_ra_and_oa.pdf",
         plot = p, width = 10, height = 12)

# ------ Promoter DMRs and expressed (across stimulatory conditions) in RA Fibroblasts  --------- #

dmr_promoter_expressed_ra_stim <- dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_df %>% filter (annot.symbol %in% ra_expressed_stim$genename & annot.type == "Promoter" & abs(meandiff) > 0.1) %>% mutate(disease_group = "RA")

#put them into categories
dmr_promoter_expressed_ra_stim <- dmr_promoter_expressed_ra_stim %>%
  mutate(category = case_when(
    annot.symbol %in% c("EBF3","HLX") ~ "Homeobox / Developmental TF",
    annot.symbol %in% c("CFB","IRF8","ACKR1") ~ "Immune / Cytokine Regulation",
    annot.symbol %in% c("FGD4", "FGD5") ~ "Signaling / Receptor Pathways",
    annot.symbol %in% c("CTNNA1","HOOK2", "UNC45A", "LRRTM2") ~ "Cytoskeleton / Adhesion",
    annot.symbol %in% c("HSD17B14","NNAT","MT3") ~ "Metabolism",
    annot.symbol %in% c("SPATS2L","PIWIL2") ~ "Post-transcriptional regulation",
    annot.symbol %in% c("BLCAP") ~ "Cell Cycle / Apoptosis",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )) %>%
  distinct(annot.symbol, disease_group, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(gene_label = make.unique(as.character(annot.symbol), sep="--")) %>%
  arrange(desc(meandiff)) %>%
  mutate(gene_label = factor(gene_label, levels = gene_label[order(dmr_promoter_expressed_ra_stim$meandiff)]))

disease_colors <- c(
  "OA" = "#C5D3E8",
  "RA" = "#A888B5"
)

p <- ggplot(dmr_promoter_expressed_ra_stim,
            aes(x = meandiff,
                y = gene_label,
                size = no.cpgs)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.9, color = "#A888B5") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    scale_size_continuous(name = "Number of CpGs", range = c(3,6), breaks = c(5,15)) +
    labs(title = "DMRs by Functional Category and Disease Specificity",
         x = "Delta Beta", y = "Genes") +
    facet_wrap(~category, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
    custom_theme_ege() +
    theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey90"),
          plot.title = element_text(size=14),
          legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines")) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=5))) + 
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,by=0.1),
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1)))

ggsave(filename = "dmrs_categorized_ra_across_stim.png",
         plot = p, width = 9, height = 7, bg = "transparent")
ggsave(filename = "dmrs_categorized_ra_across_stim.pdf",
         plot = p, width = 9, height = 7)


```

###DMR comparison
DMRs obtained from RA vs Healthy compared to other contrasts 
probe-wise aggregation (Stouffer’s method), similar to DMRcate 

```{r}
#we first read the dmps from other contrasts (e.g. knee vs shoulder within RA)
dmps_from_other_contrasts <- readRDS("outputs - after xy removal/RA_vs_OA_results_without_xy.rds")
ra_knee_vs_shoulder_dmps <- dmps_from_other_contrasts$RA_knee_vs_shoulder
oa_knee_vs_shoulder_dmps <- dmps_from_other_contrasts$OA_knee_vs_shoulder

#then we combine probe-wise p-values into a region-level statistic using Stouffer’s method (the same way DMRcate does internally) (here we use unweighted Stouffer)

compute_stouffer_for_DMRs <- function(dmr_df, dmp_df, annotation_file) {

  # annotation file with CpG coordinates
  annotation_file_to_append <- annotation_file %>%
    rownames_to_column("cpgs") %>% 
    select(chr, pos, cpgs)
  
  # attach genomic positions to DMPs
  dmp_df2 <- dmp_df %>%
    rownames_to_column("cpgs") %>%
    left_join(annotation_file_to_append, by = "cpgs") %>%
    filter(!is.na(chr) & !is.na(pos)) %>%
    select(cpgs, deltaB, P.Value, chr, pos)
  
  # convert to GRanges
  cpg_gr <- GRanges(
    seqnames = dmp_df2$chr,
    ranges   = IRanges(start = dmp_df2$pos, width = 1),
    strand   = "*",
    deltaB   = dmp_df2$deltaB,
    pval     = dmp_df2$P.Value
  )
  
  dmr_gr <- GRanges(
    seqnames = dmr_df$seqnames,
    ranges   = IRanges(start = dmr_df$start, end = dmr_df$end),
    strand   = "*"
  )
  
  # find overlapping CpGs
  hits <- findOverlaps(dmr_gr, cpg_gr)
  dmr_cpgs <- data.frame(
    dmr_idx = queryHits(hits),
    deltaB  = mcols(cpg_gr)$deltaB[subjectHits(hits)],
    pval    = mcols(cpg_gr)$pval[subjectHits(hits)]
  )
  
  # compute region-level mean deltaB and Stouffer
  region_stats <- dmr_cpgs %>%
    group_by(dmr_idx) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_deltaB = mean(deltaB, na.rm = TRUE),
      StoufferZ   = sum(qnorm(pval / 2, lower.tail = FALSE) * sign(deltaB), na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(StoufferP = 2 * pnorm(-abs(StoufferZ))) 
  
  # create output dataframe
  out <- region_stats %>%
    left_join((dmr_df %>% 
                rownames_to_column("dmr_idx")%>%
                select(dmr_idx,seqnames,
                       start,end,width,no.cpgs,annot.symbol,
                       annot.type) %>%
                 mutate(dmr_idx = as.integer(dmr_idx)))
              , by = "dmr_idx" ) %>%
    select(-dmr_idx)

  return(out)
}

ra_knee_vs_shoulder_dmrs_relative_to_ra_knee_dmps <- compute_stouffer_for_DMRs(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_df,ra_knee_vs_shoulder_dmps,annotation_file_filtered)

oa_knee_vs_shoulder_dmrs_relative_to_ra_knee_dmps <- compute_stouffer_for_DMRs(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_df,oa_knee_vs_shoulder_dmps,annotation_file_filtered)

oa_vs_healthy_knee_dmrs_relative_to_ra_knee_dmps <- compute_stouffer_for_DMRs(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_df,ra_and_oa_vs_healthy_list[[3]],annotation_file_filtered)

```

###DMR roadmap
DMR roadmap explained in the dmr roadmap powerpoint presentation is done here
(requires the DMR comparison - last code chunk)
abs(deltab) > 0.1 & all regions not only promoters

```{r}
#DMR is first filtered -> absolute deltaB > 0.1 
#also the annotations are discarded so that the true DMR number would be achieved
#because a region can be associated with more than one gene
dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_df_filtered <- dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_df %>%
  group_by(seqnames, start, end) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  # Keep only substantial mean differences and key columns
  filter(abs(meandiff) > 0.1) %>%
  select(seqnames, start, end, HMFDR, meandiff) %>%
  distinct()
#same for ra knee vs shoulder and oa knee vs shoulder oa healthy knee dmr relative dmrs
ra_knee_vs_shoulder_dmrs_relative_to_ra_knee_dmps_filtered <- ra_knee_vs_shoulder_dmrs_relative_to_ra_knee_dmps %>%
  filter(abs(mean_deltaB) > 0.1 & StoufferP < 0.05 )  %>% 
  select(seqnames,start,end,StoufferP,mean_deltaB) %>%
  distinct()

oa_knee_vs_shoulder_dmrs_relative_to_ra_knee_dmps_filtered <- oa_knee_vs_shoulder_dmrs_relative_to_ra_knee_dmps %>%
  filter(abs(mean_deltaB) > 0.1 & StoufferP < 0.05 )  %>% 
  select(seqnames,start,end,StoufferP,mean_deltaB) %>%
  distinct()

oa_vs_healthy_knee_dmrs_relative_to_ra_knee_dmps_filtered <- oa_vs_healthy_knee_dmrs_relative_to_ra_knee_dmps %>%
  filter(abs(mean_deltaB) > 0.1 & StoufferP < 0.05 )  %>% 
  select(seqnames,start,end,StoufferP,mean_deltaB) %>%
  distinct()

paste0("The number of Knee-RA DMRs are: ", nrow(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_df_filtered))

#we first ask the question are there knee RA DMRs present in RA knee vs shoulder (as DMR)
dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1 <- dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_df_filtered %>%
  left_join(ra_knee_vs_shoulder_dmrs_relative_to_ra_knee_dmps_filtered, by = c("seqnames","start","end"))

#Decision tree

#-----------------------------#

##if yes
dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1yes <- dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1 %>%
  filter(!is.na(StoufferP))

paste0("The number of Knee-RA DMRs that are present as RA knee vs shoulder DMR is: ",nrow(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1yes))

####ask is the DMR present in OA Knee vs Shoulder
dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1yes_test2 <- dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1yes %>%
  left_join(oa_knee_vs_shoulder_dmrs_relative_to_ra_knee_dmps_filtered, by = c("seqnames","start","end"))

#####if yes
dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1yes_test2yes <- dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1yes_test2 %>%
  filter(!is.na(StoufferP.y))

paste0("The number of Knee-RA Joint Dependent DMRs that are in present in as DMR in OA knee vs shoulder : ",nrow(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1yes_test2yes))

#####if no
dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1yes_test2no <- dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1yes_test2 %>%
  filter(is.na(StoufferP.y))

paste0("The number of Knee-RA Joint Dependent DMRs that are NOT in present in as DMR in OA: ",nrow(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1yes_test2no))

# --------------------------------#

##if no 
dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1no <- dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1 %>%
  filter(is.na(StoufferP))

paste0("The number of Knee-RA DMRs that are not present as RA knee vs shoulder DMR is: ",nrow(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1no))

####ask is the DMR present in OA Knee vs Shoulder

dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1no_test2 <- dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1no %>%  
  left_join(oa_knee_vs_shoulder_dmrs_relative_to_ra_knee_dmps_filtered, 
            by = c("seqnames","start","end"))

#####if yes 

dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1no_test2yes <- dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1no_test2 %>%
  filter(!is.na(StoufferP.y))

paste0("The number of Knee-RA Joint Independent DMRs that are in present in DMR in OA knee vs shoulder is: ",nrow(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1no_test2yes))

#we dont have to ask more

#####if no

dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1no_test2no <- dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1no_test2 %>%
  filter(is.na(StoufferP.y))

paste0("The number of Knee-RA Joint Independent DMRs that are NOT present in DMR in OA knee vs shoulder is: ",nrow(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1no_test2no))

######we ask one more -> is the DMR also a DMR in Knee OA DMR with the same direction? 

dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1no_test2no_test <- dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1no_test2no %>%  
  left_join(oa_vs_healthy_knee_dmrs_relative_to_ra_knee_dmps_filtered, 
            by = c("seqnames","start","end"))

#######if yes 

dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1no_test2no_testyes <- dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1no_test2no_test %>%
  filter(!is.na(StoufferP))

paste0("The number of Knee-RA Joint Independent DMRs that are in present in DMR in OA knee vs shoulder and is a OA DMR (Healthy Knee is): ",nrow(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1no_test2no_testyes))

#######if no 

dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1no_test2no_testno <- dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1no_test2no_test %>%
  filter(is.na(StoufferP))

paste0("The number of Knee-RA Joint Independent DMRs that are in present in DMR in OA knee vs shoulder and is not OA DMR (Healthy Knee is): ",nrow(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1no_test2no_testno))
```

####Exploration on DMR roadmap results

```{r}
#clean the subcategories that we had from above and put the annotations back

#yes path
maybe_disease_and_joint_specific <- dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1yes_test2yes %>%
  select(seqnames,start,end,HMFDR,meandiff) %>%
  left_join(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_df, 
            by = c("seqnames","start","end","HMFDR","meandiff")) %>%
  select(-c(min_smoothed_fdr,Stouffer,Fisher,maxdiff))

maybe_ra_joint_specific <- dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1yes_test2no %>%
  select(seqnames,start,end,HMFDR,meandiff) %>%
  left_join(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_df, 
            by = c("seqnames","start","end","HMFDR","meandiff")) %>%
  select(-c(min_smoothed_fdr,Stouffer,Fisher,maxdiff))

#no path
maybe_ra_specific_effect_in_knee <- dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1no_test2yes %>%
  select(seqnames,start,end,HMFDR,meandiff) %>%
  left_join(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_df, 
            by = c("seqnames","start","end","HMFDR","meandiff")) %>%
  select(-c(min_smoothed_fdr,Stouffer,Fisher,maxdiff))

general_disease_effect_dmrs <- dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1no_test2no_testyes %>%
  select(seqnames,start,end,HMFDR,meandiff) %>%
  left_join(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_df, 
            by = c("seqnames","start","end","HMFDR","meandiff")) %>%
  select(-c(min_smoothed_fdr,Stouffer,Fisher,maxdiff))

ra_specific_joint_independent_dmrs <- dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_test1no_test2no_testno %>%
  select(seqnames,start,end,HMFDR,meandiff) %>%
  left_join(dmr_ra_and_healthy_knee_df, 
            by = c("seqnames","start","end","HMFDR","meandiff")) %>%
  select(-c(min_smoothed_fdr,Stouffer,Fisher,maxdiff))

#lollipop plots for Promoter regions
dmr_plot_single <- function(dmr_df, title, width,height){
  
  #filter promoters with effect size
  dmr_plot_filtered <- dmr_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(annot.symbol) & annot.type == "Promoter") %>%
    arrange(desc(meandiff))
  
  #unique gene labels
  dmr_plot_filtered$gene_label <- make.unique(as.character(dmr_plot_filtered$annot.symbol), sep="--")
  dmr_plot_filtered$gene_label <- factor(
    dmr_plot_filtered$gene_label,
    levels = dmr_plot_filtered$gene_label[order(-dmr_plot_filtered$meandiff)]
  )

  #plot
  p <- ggplot(dmr_plot_filtered,
              aes(x = meandiff,
                  y = gene_label,
                  size = no.cpgs)) +
    geom_point(color = "#A888B5", alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    scale_size_continuous(name = "Number of CpGs",
                          range = c(3,6), breaks = c(5,15)) +
    labs(title = title, x = "Delta Beta", y = "Genes") +
    theme_publish(base_size = 14, base_linewidth = 0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey90"),
          plot.title = element_text(size=14)) +
    guides(size = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = "#A888B5"))) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,by=0.1),
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1)))
  
  ggsave(filename = paste0(title, "_lollipop_plot.png"),
         plot = p, width = width, height = height, bg = "transparent")
  ggsave(filename = paste0(title, "_lollipop_plot.pdf"),
         plot = p, width = width, height = height)

}

dmr_plot_single(maybe_disease_and_joint_specific, title = "Disease and Joint Specific DMRs",width= 6, height = 4)

dmr_plot_single(maybe_ra_joint_specific, title = "RA Joint Specific DMRs",width= 6, height = 4)

dmr_plot_single(maybe_ra_specific_effect_in_knee, title = "RA Specific (in knee) DMRs",width= 5, height = 3)

dmr_plot_single(general_disease_effect_dmrs, title = "General Disease Effect DMRs",width= 5, height = 10)

dmr_plot_single(ra_specific_joint_independent_dmrs, title = "RA Specific Effect\n(joint independent) DMRs",width= 5, height = 6.5)

#---- ORA -----

#define universe genes
universe_genes <- unique(annotation_file_filtered$genesUniq)
universe_genes <- universe_genes[universe_genes != ""]

#convert them to entrez IDs
universe_entrez <- bitr(universe_genes,
                            fromType = "SYMBOL",
                            toType = "ENTREZID",
                            OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db)

do_ora <- function(dmrs_of_interest){
  
  #define the genes of interest (from dmps)
  genes_of_interest <- unique(dmrs_of_interest$annot.symbol)
  genes_of_interest <- genes_of_interest[genes_of_interest != ""]
  
  genes_of_interest_entrez <- bitr(genes_of_interest, 
                                   fromType = "SYMBOL",
                                   toType = "ENTREZID",
                                   OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db)

  reactome_res <- enrichPathway(
    gene = genes_of_interest_entrez$ENTREZID,
    universe = universe_entrez$ENTREZID,
    organism = "human",
    pvalueCutoff = 1,
    readable = TRUE)

  return(reactome_res@result)
}

ora_disease_joint_specific <- do_ora(maybe_disease_and_joint_specific)
ora_ra_joint_specific <- do_ora(maybe_ra_joint_specific)
ora_ra_specific_in_knee <- do_ora(maybe_ra_specific_effect_in_knee)
ora_general_disease_effect <- do_ora(general_disease_effect_dmrs)
ora_ra_specific_joint_indenpendent <- do_ora(ra_specific_joint_independent_dmrs)

#return string form of the genes ---
print_string <- function (dmrs_of_interest) {
  genes_of_interest <- unique(dmrs_of_interest$annot.symbol)
  genes_of_interest <- genes_of_interest[!(genes_of_interest %in% c("",NA))]
  genes_string <- paste(genes_of_interest,collapse = '","')
  genes_string <- paste0('"', genes_string, '"')
  cat(genes_string)
}

print_string(maybe_disease_and_joint_specific)
print_string(maybe_ra_joint_specific)
print_string(maybe_ra_specific_effect_in_knee)
print_string(general_disease_effect_dmrs)
print_string(ra_specific_joint_independent_dmrs)

# ------ Combine the joint-confounded categories and make a lollipop plot ---------

maybe_disease_and_joint_specific <- maybe_disease_and_joint_specific %>%
  mutate(disease_group = "Arthritis-joint")
maybe_ra_joint_specific <- maybe_ra_joint_specific %>%
  mutate(disease_group = "RA-joint")
maybe_ra_specific_effect_in_knee <- maybe_ra_specific_effect_in_knee %>%
  mutate(disease_group = "RA-joint")
dmr_combined <- bind_rows(maybe_disease_and_joint_specific,
                          maybe_ra_joint_specific,
                          maybe_ra_specific_effect_in_knee)
#do categorization 
dmr_combined <- dmr_combined %>%
  mutate(category = case_when(
    annot.symbol %in% c("IRX1","IRX2","DLX6-AS1","MEIS2","WT1","PAX1","EBF3","TBX18","HLX","HLX-AS1") ~ "Homeobox / developmental TF",
    annot.symbol %in% c("HDAC4","PRDM6","BIRC5","FOXO1") ~ "Epigenetic / cell cycle regulators",
    annot.symbol %in% c("IRF8","CD8A","CFB","ACKR1") ~ "Immune / cytokine regulation",
    annot.symbol %in% c("IGF1R","CTNNA1","SDK1","CADM3-AS1") ~ "Signaling / adhesion",
    annot.symbol %in% c("PIWIL2","PIWIL2-DT","LOC124901353","LOC105374618","LOC101927914","MIR193B","MIR193BHG") ~ "Noncoding / pseudogene / lncRNA",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  ))

#filtering before plotting
dmr_combined <- dmr_combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(annot.symbol)) %>%      # remove NA genes
  filter(category != "Other") %>%       # remove 'Other'
  distinct(annot.symbol, disease_group, .keep_all = TRUE) %>% # one row per DMR–gene
  mutate(gene_label = make.unique(as.character(annot.symbol), sep="--")) %>%
  arrange(desc(meandiff)) %>%
  mutate(gene_label = factor(gene_label, levels = gene_label[order(dmr_combined$meandiff)]))

#colors for the categories
disease_colors <- c(
  "Arthritis-joint" = "#2F5755",
  "RA-joint" = "#A888B5"
)

#plotting
p <- ggplot(dmr_combined,
            aes(x = meandiff,
                y = gene_label,
                size = no.cpgs,
                color = disease_group)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    scale_size_continuous(name = "Number of CpGs", range = c(3,6), breaks = c(5,15)) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Disease Specificity", values = disease_colors) +
    labs(title = "DMRs by Functional Category and Disease Specificity",
         x = "Delta Beta", y = "Genes") +
    facet_wrap(~category, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
    theme_publish(base_size = 14, base_linewidth = 0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey90"),
          plot.title = element_text(size=14),
          legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),  # bigger legend points
          legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 10)) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=5))) + 
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,by=0.1),
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1)))

ggsave(filename = "joint_confounded_categories_lollipop.png",
         plot = p, width = 10, height = 8, bg = "transparent")

# ------ Combine the joint-independent categories and make a lollipop plot ---------

general_disease_effect_dmrs <- general_disease_effect_dmrs %>%
  mutate(disease_group = "Arthritis Effect")
ra_specific_joint_independent_dmrs <- ra_specific_joint_independent_dmrs %>%
  mutate(disease_group = "RA Specific Effect")
dmr_combined <- bind_rows(general_disease_effect_dmrs,
                          ra_specific_joint_independent_dmrs)

#do categorization 
dmr_combined <- dmr_combined %>%
  mutate(category = case_when(
    annot.symbol %in% c("HOXD11","SUMF1","LRRTM1","RGS6","ADARB2","RBFOX1","WT1","FOXO1","IGF1R","BIRC5","EBF3","TBX3") ~ "Homeobox / developmental TF",
    annot.symbol %in% c("CIITA","CRP","CFB","HSH2D","IRF8") ~ "Immune / inflammatory",
    annot.symbol %in% c("GPX5","GPX6","FTMT","SLC7A2") ~ "Iron / oxidative metabolism",
    annot.symbol %in% c("DSG4","MFAP2","OPCML","DSG1-AS1") ~ "ECM / adhesion / cytoskeleton",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  ))

dmr_combined <- dmr_combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(annot.symbol)) %>%      # remove NA genes
  filter(category != "Other") %>%       # remove 'Other'
  distinct(annot.symbol, disease_group, .keep_all = TRUE) %>% # one row per DMR–gene
  mutate(gene_label = make.unique(as.character(annot.symbol), sep="--")) %>%
  arrange(desc(meandiff)) %>%
  mutate(gene_label = factor(gene_label, levels = gene_label[order(dmr_combined$meandiff)]))

#colors for the categories
disease_colors <- c(
  "Arthritis Effect" = "#2F5755",
  "RA Specific Effect" = "#A888B5"
)

#plotting
p <- ggplot(dmr_combined,
            aes(x = meandiff,
                y = gene_label,
                size = no.cpgs,
                color = disease_group)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    scale_size_continuous(name = "Number of CpGs", range = c(3,6), breaks = c(5,15)) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Disease Specificity", values = disease_colors) +
    labs(title = "DMRs by Functional Category and Disease Specificity",
         x = "Delta Beta", y = "Genes") +
    facet_wrap(~category, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
    theme_publish(base_size = 14, base_linewidth = 0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey90"),
          plot.title = element_text(size=14),
          legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),  # bigger legend points
          legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 10)) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=5))) + 
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,by=0.1),
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1)))

ggsave(filename = "joint_independent_categories_lollipop.png",
         plot = p, width = 10, height = 8, bg = "transparent")


#---- To check if they overlap with the risk variants-----

# #read risk snps (all of them)
# ra_cred_snps_all <- read.delim("~/Desktop/PhD/2024 Second Term/SNP analysis/RA_all_cred_hg38_PP.bed",header = FALSE)
# 
# # convert to granges
# snp_gr <- GRanges(
#   seqnames = ra_cred_snps_all$V1,
#   ranges = IRanges(
#     start = ra_cred_snps_all$V2,
#     end = ra_cred_snps_all$V3))
# 
# # find overlapping ra risk snps with the dmrs
# find_overlaps_with_risk_snps <- function(dmr_df) {
#   #convert dmr to granges
#   dmr_gr <- GRanges(
#     seqnames = dmr_df$seqnames,
#     ranges = IRanges(
#       start = dmr_df$start,
#       end = dmr_df$end),
#     gene = dmr_df$annot.symbol,
#     disease_group = dmr_df$disease_group)
#   hits <- findOverlaps(dmr_gr, snp_gr)
#   dmr_snps_overlap <- dmr_df[unique(queryHits(hits)), ]
#   return(dmr_snps_overlap)
#   }
# 
# -------- none of them overlap

# ------ do annotatr with chromhmm tracks -------

#read the chromhmm dfs
ra_knee_chromhmm_df <- read.table("chromhmm tracks/ra_knee_368.bed", sep = "\t", header = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

healthy_knee_chromhmm_df <-read.table("chromhmm tracks/healthy_knee_88.bed", sep = "\t", header = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) 

find_chromhmm_overlaps <- function(chromhmm_df, dmr_df){
  
  #read the chromhmm dataframe 
  colnames(chromhmm_df) <- c("chr", "start", "end", "state")

  #convert the chromatin states to their biological meaning
  chromhmm_state_map <- data.frame(
  state = paste0("E", 1:18),
  annotation = c(
    "Active TSS",
    "Flanking Active TSS",
    "Transcription at gene 5′ and 3′",
    "Strong transcription",
    "Weak transcription",
    "Genic enhancer",
    "Enhancer 1",
    "Enhancer 2",
    "Bivalent/Poised TSS",
    "Bivalent enhancer",
    "Repressed PolyComb",
    "ZNF genes & repeats",
    "Heterochromatin",
    "Quiescent/Low",
    "Repetitive/Quiescent",
    "Weak promoter/poised",
    "Weak enhancer",
    "Repressed/CTCF"
    )
  )

  #biological label to chromhmm
  chromhmm_df <- chromhmm_df %>%
    left_join(chromhmm_state_map, by = "state") %>% 
    select(!state)

  #convert both dfs to granges
  dmr_gr <- GRanges(
    seqnames = dmr_df$seqnames,
    ranges = IRanges(start = dmr_df$start, end = dmr_df$end),
    mcols = dmr_df)
  
  chromhmm_gr <- GRanges(
    seqnames = chromhmm_df$chr,
    ranges = IRanges(start = chromhmm_df$start, end = chromhmm_df$end),
    annotation = chromhmm_df$annotation)
  
  #find overlaps
  hits <- findOverlaps(dmr_gr, chromhmm_gr)
  
  #combine dmrs with chromhmm annotation
  dmr_with_state <- dmr_df[queryHits(hits), ] %>%
    mutate(
      chromhmm_label = chromhmm_gr$annotation[subjectHits(hits)]
    )
  
  dmr_annotations <- dmr_with_state %>%
    select(seqnames, start, end, chromhmm_label) %>%
    distinct() %>%
    group_by(seqnames, start, end) %>%
    summarise(chromhmm_labels = list(unique(chromhmm_label)), .groups = "drop") %>%
    unnest(chromhmm_labels) %>%
    mutate(present = 1) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = chromhmm_labels,
      values_from = present,
      values_fill = 0
    )
  
  upset_data <- dmr_annotations %>%
    select(-c(seqnames, start, end)) %>%
    as.data.frame()  
  
  return(list(
    dmr_with_annotations = dmr_with_state,
    upset_data = upset_data
  ))
}

#you can go to the upset plot code chunk above and do the plotting
test <- find_chromhmm_overlaps(ra_knee_chromhmm_df,general_disease_effect_dmrs)


```

#####Upset plots of ChromHMM tracks from the categories above

```{r}
#do one by one otherwise it doesnt work ... 

#change the upset_data return here
dmr_chromhmm_return <-test
  
png("dmr_chromhmm_upset.png", width = 2500, height = 2200, units = "px")

upset(
  dmr_chromhmm_return$upset_data,
  sets = colnames(dmr_chromhmm_return$upset_data),
  order.by = "freq",
  point.size = 20,
  line.size = 3,
  mainbar.y.label = NULL,
  sets.x.label = NULL,
  number.angles = 0,
  text.scale = 8,
  nintersects = 10
)

dev.off()
```

###-end
###after this is draft

###DMR lollipop plots - comparisons? 
The data frames constructed in the dmr annotation part should be used
for ra interaction results

```{r}
#first we have to calculate deltaB_RA and deltaB_OA so that we can plot it
compute_deltaB_for_DMRs <- function(dmr_df,dmp_df,annotation_file){
  
  #to calculate mean beta values for dmrs and getting both of them (RA and OA) we have to map the dmps to dmrs
  #get the coordinations of the dmps from annotation file
  annotation_file_to_append <- annotation_file %>%
    rownames_to_column("cpgs") %>% 
    select("chr","pos","cpgs")
  
  dmp_df <- dmp_df %>%
    rownames_to_column("cpgs") %>%
    left_join(annotation_file_to_append, by ="cpgs") %>%
    select(c("cpgs","deltaB_RA","deltaB_OA","deltadeltaB","chr","pos"))
  
  #convert it to a granges object
  cpg_gr <- GRanges(
    seqnames = dmp_df$chr,
    ranges = IRanges(start = dmp_df$pos, width = 1),
    strand = "*",
    deltaB_RA = dmp_df$deltaB_RA,
    deltaB_OA = dmp_df$deltaB_OA
  )
  
  #compute mean deltaB_RA and mean deltaB_OA from cpgs
  dmr_df <- GRanges(
    seqnames = dmr_df$seqnames,
    ranges = IRanges(start = dmr_df$start, end = dmr_df$end),
    strand = "*",
    HMFDR =dmr_df$HMFDR,
    meandiff = dmr_df$meandiff,
    annot.symbol = dmr_df$annot.symbol,
    annot.type = dmr_df$annot.type,
    no.cpgs = dmr_df$no.cpgs
  )
  #find the cpgs overlapping with the dmrs
  hits <- findOverlaps(dmr_df, cpg_gr)
  dmr_df_new <- data.frame(
    dmr = queryHits(hits),
    deltaB_RA = mcols(cpg_gr)$deltaB_RA[subjectHits(hits)],
    deltaB_OA = mcols(cpg_gr)$deltaB_OA[subjectHits(hits)]
  )
  
  mean_deltas <- dmr_df_new %>%
    group_by(dmr) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_deltaB_RA = mean(deltaB_RA, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_deltaB_OA = mean(deltaB_OA, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  
  #append to the dmr granges
  mcols(dmr_df)$mean_deltaB_RA[mean_deltas$dmr] <- mean_deltas$mean_deltaB_RA
  mcols(dmr_df)$mean_deltaB_OA[mean_deltas$dmr] <- mean_deltas$mean_deltaB_OA
  # you can check if your computing was right
  # mcols(dmr_df)$mean_deltadeltaB <-
  #   mcols(dmr_df)$mean_deltaB_RA -
  #   mcols(dmr_df)$mean_deltaB_OA
  # it is very accurate
  return(dmr_df)
}

#compute deltaB_RA and deltaB_OA for interactions
ra_interaction_hand_vs_shoulder_dmrs <- compute_deltaB_for_DMRs(interaction_hand_vs_shoulder_dmr_df,ra_vs_oa_list[[10]],annotation_file)

ra_interaction_knee_vs_shoulder_dmrs <- compute_deltaB_for_DMRs(interaction_knee_vs_shoulder_dmr_df,ra_vs_oa_list[[11]],annotation_file)

ra_interaction_knee_vs_hand_dmrs <- compute_deltaB_for_DMRs(interaction_knee_vs_hand_dmr_df,ra_vs_oa_list[[12]],annotation_file)

#modified lollipop plot with the deltaB_RA and deltaB_OA different colors
#only looking at the promoter regions
dmr_plot_maker <- function(granges_object, string1, string2,up_or_down){
  
  dmr_plot <- as.data.frame(granges_object)
  dmr_plot_filtered <- dmr_plot %>%
    filter(!is.na(annot.symbol) & abs(meandiff) > 0.1 & annot.type =="Promoter" )
  
  if (up_or_down == "up"){
      dmr_plot_filtered <- dmr_plot_filtered %>%
        arrange(desc(meandiff)) %>%
        slice_head(n = 30) 
  }else {
      dmr_plot_filtered <- dmr_plot_filtered %>%
        arrange(meandiff) %>%
        slice_head(n = 30) 
  }

  #factor it for yaxis
  #separating the genes with multiple entries
  dmr_plot_filtered$gene_label <- make.unique(as.character(dmr_plot_filtered$annot.symbol), sep="--")
  dmr_plot_filtered$gene_label <- factor(
    dmr_plot_filtered$gene_label,
    levels = dmr_plot_filtered$gene_label[order(-dmr_plot_filtered$mean_deltaB_RA)]
  )
  # Reshape data to long format for deltaB_RA and deltaB_OA
  dmr_long <- dmr_plot_filtered %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(mean_deltaB_RA, mean_deltaB_OA),
                 names_to = "condition", values_to = "deltaB") %>%
    mutate(condition = recode(condition,
                              mean_deltaB_RA = "RA",
                              mean_deltaB_OA = "OA"))

  # Title logic
  title <- paste0(string1, " in\n", string2, "-",up_or_down)

  # Plot
  p <- ggplot() +
    # Line segment between RA and OA values
    geom_segment(data = dmr_plot_filtered,
                 aes(y = gene_label,
                     x = mean_deltaB_RA,
                     xend = mean_deltaB_OA,
                     yend = gene_label),
                 color = "grey60") +
    # Points for RA and OA
    geom_point(data = dmr_long,
               aes(x = deltaB, 
                   y = gene_label, 
                   color = condition,
                   size = no.cpgs),
               , alpha=0.9) +
    scale_size_continuous(name = "Number of CpGs",range = c(3,6),breaks=c(5,15))+
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("RA" = "#A888B5", "OA" = "#C5D3E8"),
                       name = "Condition") +
    labs(title = title, x = "Delta Beta", y = "Genes") +
    theme_publish(base_size = 14, base_linewidth = 0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey90"),
          plot.title = element_text(size=14)) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 5)))+
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,by=0.1),
      ,expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1)))
  
  ggsave(filename = paste0(string1, "_", string2, "-", up_or_down, ".png"),
         plot = p, width = 8, height = 6.5, bg = "transparent")
}

# dmr_plot_maker(ra_interaction_hand_vs_shoulder_dmrs, "RA Interaction", "Hand vs Shoulder", "up" )
# dmr_plot_maker(ra_interaction_hand_vs_shoulder_dmrs, "RA Interaction", "Hand vs Shoulder", "down" )
# 
# dmr_plot_maker(ra_interaction_knee_vs_shoulder_dmrs, "RA Interaction", "Knee vs Shoulder","up" )
# dmr_plot_maker(ra_interaction_knee_vs_shoulder_dmrs, "RA Interaction", "Knee vs Shoulder","down" )
# 
# dmr_plot_maker(ra_interaction_knee_vs_hand_dmrs, "RA Interaction", "Knee vs Hand", "up" )
# dmr_plot_maker(ra_interaction_knee_vs_hand_dmrs, "RA Interaction", "Knee vs Hand", "down" )


```

##Functional DMR related - promoters

```{r}
#to do lollipop plots with the functional regions (promoter region)
#for interaction comparisons

func_dmr_maker_interaction <- function(ra_dmrs_df, ra_dmps_df){
  
  # Add empty columns
  ra_dmrs_df$mean_deltaB_RA <- NA
  ra_dmrs_df$mean_deltaB_OA <- NA
  ra_dmrs_df$meandiff <- NA
  
  # Loop through each row
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(ra_dmrs_df))) {
    # Extract leading-edge CpGs
    cpgs <- strsplit(ra_dmrs_df$leadingEdge[i], ",\\s*")[[1]]
    
    # Subset the corresponding deltaB table
    subset_vals <- ra_dmps_df[cpgs, , drop = FALSE]
    
    # Compute means and append it to func dmr table
    ra_dmrs_df$mean_deltaB_RA[i] <- mean(subset_vals$deltaB_RA, na.rm = TRUE)
    ra_dmrs_df$mean_deltaB_OA[i] <- mean(subset_vals$deltaB_OA, na.rm = TRUE)
    ra_dmrs_df$meandiff[i] <- mean(subset_vals$deltadeltaB, na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  return(ra_dmrs_df)
  }

#read the object from mcsea functional dmr analysis
ra_vs_oa_func_dmr_list <- readRDS("RA_vs_OA_promoter_dmr_results.rds")

#compute deltaB_RA and OA values from the dmp list using leading edge cpgs from dmrs 
ra_interaction_hand_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs <- ra_vs_oa_func_dmr_list[[10]]
ra_interaction_hand_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs <- func_dmr_maker_interaction(ra_interaction_hand_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs,ra_vs_oa_list[[10]] )

ra_interaction_knee_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs <- ra_vs_oa_func_dmr_list[[11]]
ra_interaction_knee_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs <- func_dmr_maker_interaction(ra_interaction_knee_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs,ra_vs_oa_list[[11]] )

ra_interaction_knee_vs_hand_func_dmrs <- ra_vs_oa_func_dmr_list[[12]]
ra_interaction_knee_vs_hand_func_dmrs <- func_dmr_maker_interaction(ra_interaction_knee_vs_hand_func_dmrs,ra_vs_oa_list[[12]] )

func_dmr_plot_maker <- function(dmr_plot, string1, string2,up_or_down){
  
  dmr_plot <- dmr_plot[order(dmr_plot$padj),]
  #top30 up or down
  if (up_or_down == "up"){
      dmr_plot_filtered <- dmr_plot %>%
        arrange(desc(meandiff)) %>%
        slice_head(n = 30) 
  }else {
      dmr_plot_filtered <- dmr_plot %>%
        arrange(meandiff) %>%
        slice_head(n = 30) 
  }

  #factor it for yaxis
  dmr_plot_filtered$gene <- factor(
    dmr_plot_filtered$gene,
    levels = dmr_plot_filtered$gene[order(-dmr_plot_filtered$mean_deltaB_RA)]
  )
  # Reshape data to long format for deltaB_RA and deltaB_OA
  dmr_long <- dmr_plot_filtered %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(mean_deltaB_RA, mean_deltaB_OA),
                 names_to = "condition", values_to = "deltaB") %>%
    mutate(condition = recode(condition,
                              mean_deltaB_RA = "RA",
                              mean_deltaB_OA = "OA"))

  # Title logic
  title <- paste0(string1, " in\n", string2, "-",up_or_down)

  # Plot
  p <- ggplot() +
    # Line segment between RA and OA values
    geom_segment(data = dmr_plot_filtered,
                 aes(y = gene,
                     x = mean_deltaB_RA,
                     xend = mean_deltaB_OA,
                     yend = gene),
                 color = "grey60") +
    # Points for RA and OA
    geom_point(data = dmr_long,
               aes(x = deltaB, 
                   y = gene, 
                   color = condition,
                   size = size),
               , alpha=0.9) +
    scale_size_continuous(name = "Number of CpGs",range = c(3,6),breaks=c(5,15))+
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("RA" = "#A888B5", "OA" = "#C5D3E8"),
                       name = "Condition") +
    labs(title = title, x = "Delta Beta", y = "Genes") +
    theme_publish(base_size = 14, base_linewidth = 0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey90"),
          plot.title = element_text(size=14)) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 5)))+
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,1,by=0.1),
      ,expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1)))
  
  ggsave(filename = paste0(string1, "_", string2,"_",up_or_down, ".png"),
         plot = p, width = 8, height = 6.5, bg = "transparent")
}

# func_dmr_plot_maker(ra_interaction_hand_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs,"RA Interaction", "Hand vs Shoulder promoters","up") 
# func_dmr_plot_maker(ra_interaction_hand_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs,"RA Interaction", "Hand vs Shoulder promoters","down") 
# 
# func_dmr_plot_maker(ra_interaction_knee_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs,"RA Interaction", "Knee vs Shoulder (promoters)","up") 
# func_dmr_plot_maker(ra_interaction_knee_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs,"RA Interaction", "Knee vs Shoulder (promoters)","down") 
# 
# func_dmr_plot_maker(ra_interaction_knee_vs_hand_func_dmrs,"RA Interaction", "Knee vs Hand (promoters)","up") 
# func_dmr_plot_maker(ra_interaction_knee_vs_hand_func_dmrs ,"RA Interaction", "Knee vs Hand (promoters)","down") 
```

Using DMRs with functional regions -> filtering and finding common genes

```{r}
#filtering for abs(meandiff) bigger and equal than 0.1 and getting the gene names
ra_interaction_hand_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs_gene_set <-  ra_interaction_hand_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs %>%
  filter(abs(meandiff) >= 0.1) %>%
  select(gene)
ra_interaction_hand_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs_gene_set <- as.vector(ra_interaction_hand_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs_gene_set)[[1]]

ra_interaction_knee_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs_gene_set <-  ra_interaction_knee_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs %>%
  filter(abs(meandiff) >= 0.1) %>%
  select(gene)
ra_interaction_knee_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs_gene_set <- as.vector(ra_interaction_knee_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs_gene_set)[[1]]

ra_interaction_knee_vs_hand_func_dmrs_gene_set <-  ra_interaction_knee_vs_hand_func_dmrs %>%
  filter(abs(meandiff) >= 0.1) %>%
  select(gene)
ra_interaction_knee_vs_hand_func_dmrs_gene_set <- as.vector(ra_interaction_knee_vs_hand_func_dmrs_gene_set)[[1]]

venn.plot <- venn.diagram(
  x = list(set1 = ra_interaction_hand_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs_gene_set, set2 = ra_interaction_knee_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs_gene_set, set3 = ra_interaction_knee_vs_hand_func_dmrs_gene_set),
  category.names = c("RA Interaction\nHand vs Shoulder", "RA Interaction\nKnee vs Shoulder", "RA Interaction\nKnee vs Hand"), filename=NULL,
  # Circles
  lwd = 1,
  col =  c("#C562AF","#8ACCD5","#465C88"),
  fill = c("#C562AF50","#8ACCD550","#465C8850"),
  cex = 1.0,
  fontface = "bold",
  fontfamily = "sans",       
  cat.cex = 0.8,
  cat.fontface = "bold",
  cat.default.pos = "outer",
  cat.pos = c( -27,27 , -135),
  cat.dist = c(0.06,0.06, 0.06),
  cat.col = c("#C562AF","#8ACCD5","#465C88"),
  disable.logging = TRUE
)
# Plot Venn diagram
ggsave(
  plot = venn.plot,
  filename = "vennplot_ra_interactions_comparisons.png",
  bg = "transparent",
  width = 5, height = 5
)

```

Using DMRs with functional regions -> making heatmaps

```{r}
#making a loop over the interaction func dmr df, having the mean cpg values per patient from dmp dfs and constructing the heatmaps

#filtering the dmrs by deltadeltaB values and arranging by them
ra_interaction_hand_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs <- ra_interaction_hand_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs %>%
    filter(abs(meandiff) >= 0.1) %>%
    arrange(meandiff)

ra_interaction_knee_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs <- ra_interaction_knee_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs %>%
    filter(abs(meandiff) >= 0.1) %>%
    arrange(meandiff)

ra_interaction_knee_vs_hand_func_dmrs <- ra_interaction_knee_vs_hand_func_dmrs %>%
    filter(abs(meandiff) >= 0.1) %>%
    arrange(meandiff)

#preparing the patient metadatas
ra_hand_patients <- patients %>% filter(final_location == "hand", Final_Group == "RA")
ra_shoulder_patients <- patients %>% filter(final_location == "shoulder", Final_Group == "RA")
ra_knee_patients <- patients %>% filter(final_location == "knee", Final_Group == "RA")

oa_hand_patients <- patients %>% filter(final_location == "hand", Final_Group == "OA")
oa_shoulder_patients <- patients %>% filter(final_location == "shoulder", Final_Group == "OA")
oa_knee_patients <- patients %>% filter(final_location == "knee", Final_Group == "OA")

#the function
#first argument -> filtered and arranged dmr df
#second argument -> patient metadata list that should follow ra first joint - second joint, oa first joint - second joint
mean_cpg_calculation_for_heatmap <- function (dmr_df, patient_metadata_list) {
  
  #to append the values first create empty dfs
  ra_first_beta_means_df <- data.frame()
  ra_second_beta_means_df <- data.frame()
  oa_first_beta_means_df <- data.frame()
  oa_second_beta_means_df <- data.frame()
  
  #to filter the betavalues df
  ra_first_patient <- patient_metadata_list[[1]]
  ra_second_patient <- patient_metadata_list[[2]]
  oa_first_patient <- patient_metadata_list[[3]]
  oa_second_patient <- patient_metadata_list[[4]]
  
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(dmr_df))) {

    #extract leading-edge cpgs
    cpgs <- strsplit(dmr_df$leadingEdge[i], ",\\s*")[[1]]
    gene <- dmr_df$gene[i]
    
    #ra first 
    ra_first_beta <- beta_values[cpgs, ra_first_patient$Patient_Name, drop = FALSE]
    ra_first_beta <- as.data.frame(t(colMeans(ra_first_beta, na.rm = TRUE)))
    rownames(ra_first_beta) <- gene
    ra_first_beta_means_df <- rbind(ra_first_beta_means_df, ra_first_beta)
    
    #ra second
    ra_second_beta <- beta_values[cpgs, ra_second_patient$Patient_Name, drop = FALSE]
    ra_second_beta <- as.data.frame(t(colMeans(ra_second_beta, na.rm = TRUE)))
    rownames(ra_second_beta) <- gene
    ra_second_beta_means_df <- rbind(ra_second_beta_means_df, ra_second_beta)
    
    #oa first
    oa_first_beta <- beta_values[cpgs, oa_first_patient$Patient_Name, drop = FALSE]
    oa_first_beta <- as.data.frame(t(colMeans(oa_first_beta, na.rm = TRUE)))
    rownames(oa_first_beta) <- gene
    oa_first_beta_means_df <- rbind(oa_first_beta_means_df, oa_first_beta)
    
    #oa second
    oa_second_beta <- beta_values[cpgs, oa_second_patient$Patient_Name, drop = FALSE]
    oa_second_beta <- as.data.frame(t(colMeans(oa_second_beta, na.rm = TRUE)))
    rownames(oa_second_beta) <- gene
    oa_second_beta_means_df <- rbind(oa_second_beta_means_df, oa_second_beta)
    } 
  
  #bind them and also prepare the metadata for heatmaps
  ra_df_for_heatmap <- cbind(ra_first_beta_means_df, ra_second_beta_means_df)
  ra_patients_metadata_for_heatmap <- rbind(ra_first_patient,ra_second_patient)
  ra_patients_metadata_for_heatmap <- ra_patients_metadata_for_heatmap %>%
    column_to_rownames("Patient_Name") %>%
    select("final_location") %>%
    rename("final_location" = "Joint")
  
  oa_df_for_heatmap <- cbind(oa_first_beta_means_df, oa_second_beta_means_df)
  oa_patients_metadata_for_heatmap <- rbind(oa_first_patient,oa_second_patient)
  oa_patients_metadata_for_heatmap <- oa_patients_metadata_for_heatmap %>%
    column_to_rownames("Patient_Name") %>%
    select("final_location") %>%
    rename("final_location" = "Joint")
  
  return(list("ra_df_for_heatmap" = ra_df_for_heatmap,
              "ra_patients_metadata_for_heatmap"=ra_patients_metadata_for_heatmap,
              "oa_df_for_heatmap" = oa_df_for_heatmap,
              "oa_patients_metadata_for_heatmap"=oa_patients_metadata_for_heatmap))
}

#compute the mean beta values for each patient 
#it returns a list -> the first one is mean beta values, second one is metadata for that specific combination (same for ra and oa)
ra_interaction_hand_vs_shoulder_heatmap_list <- mean_cpg_calculation_for_heatmap(ra_interaction_hand_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs, list(ra_hand_patients,ra_shoulder_patients,oa_hand_patients,oa_shoulder_patients) )

ra_interaction_knee_vs_shoulder_heatmap_list <- mean_cpg_calculation_for_heatmap(ra_interaction_knee_vs_shoulder_func_dmrs, list(ra_knee_patients,ra_shoulder_patients,oa_knee_patients,oa_shoulder_patients) )

ra_interaction_knee_vs_hand_func_dmrs <- mean_cpg_calculation_for_heatmap(ra_interaction_knee_vs_hand_func_dmrs, list(ra_knee_patients,ra_hand_patients,oa_knee_patients,oa_hand_patients) )

#to draw the heatmap
#the first argument is the dmr heatmap list that was returned by mean_cpg_calculation_for_heatmap function
#the second argument is the joint vs joint string
dmr_heatmap_maker <- function(dmr_heatmap_list,string1){
  
  # Heatmaps
  p1 <- pheatmap(dmr_heatmap_list[[1]], cluster_rows = FALSE, 
                 cluster_cols = FALSE, silent =TRUE,
                 annotation_col = dmr_heatmap_list[[2]],annotation_legend = FALSE,
                 #fontsize_row = 7,
                 show_rownames = FALSE,
                 scale = "row" 
                 #main = paste0("RA ", string1),
                 #main= NULL
                 )
  
  p2 <- pheatmap(dmr_heatmap_list[[3]], cluster_rows = FALSE, 
                 cluster_cols = FALSE, silent =TRUE,
                 annotation_col = dmr_heatmap_list[[4]],annotation_legend = FALSE,
                 #fontsize_row = 7,
                 show_rownames = FALSE,
                 scale = "row"
                 #main = paste0("OA ", string1),
                 #main = NULL
                 )
  
  #to ensure that the heights of the two pheatmap plots (p1 and p2) are equal
  g1 <- p1$gtable
  g2 <- p2$gtable
  g1$heights <- g2$heights <- unit.pmax(g1$heights, g2$heights)
  heatmap <- arrangeGrob(g1, g2, ncol = 2)
  
  #when you ensure the heigths of the two plots are equal, title is being cut off
  #so we add title afterwards 
  #not the best solution
  heatmap <- arrangeGrob(
    grid::textGrob(paste0("RA Interaction ", string1, " Heatmap"),
                   gp = gpar(fontsize = 13, fontface = "bold")),
    heatmap,
    ncol = 1,
    heights = unit.c(unit(1, "lines"), unit(1, "null"))
  )
  
  ggsave(
    plot = heatmap,
    filename = paste0("RA Interaction_",string1,"_heatmap.png"),
    bg = "transparent",
    width = 6, height = 5)
}

dmr_heatmap_maker(ra_interaction_hand_vs_shoulder_heatmap_list, "Hand vs Shoulder")
dmr_heatmap_maker(ra_interaction_knee_vs_shoulder_heatmap_list, "Knee vs Shoulder")
dmr_heatmap_maker(ra_interaction_knee_vs_hand_func_dmrs, "Knee vs Hand")

```
